+# Coral Keepers Editing Rules
+
+- Keep the Student and Teacher versions aligned when a change applies to both views.
+- If a change is version-specific, keep it only in the matching folder.
+- When editing mirrored screens, update the parallel Student and Teacher files in the same pass whenever possible.
+- Preserve existing relative links and asset paths.
+- Do not move the Student version into a separate folder until the shared structure is stable and links have been reviewed.
+- Teacher navigation and switches should continue to point to the correct Teacher pages.
+- Student navigation and switches should continue to point to the correct Student pages.

+# AI Onboarding (Cross-Tool)
+
+Use this file when working in any AI coding tool (Copilot, Cursor, Claude, etc.).
+
+## Read These First (In Order)
+1. .github/copilot-instructions.md
+2. PROJECT_CONTEXT.md
+3. DESIGN_GUIDELINES.md
+
+## Required Working Rules
+- Keep Student and Teacher versions aligned when a change applies to both.
+- Keep version-specific changes only in the matching folder.
+- Preserve existing relative links and asset paths.
+- Keep Teacher navigation/routes in Teacher pages and Student navigation/routes in Student pages.
+- Reuse existing visual style (typography, spacing, color language) unless explicitly asked to redesign.
+
+## Cory Chat Consistency Contract
+When editing Cory chat, keep behavior consistent across pages:
+- Trigger at bottom-right.
+- Open/close via trigger, close button, outside click, and Escape.
+- Empty initial chat body.
+- User bubbles right (blue), Cory bubbles left (light gray).
+- Input submits with Enter and Send button.
+
+## Before Finishing Any Task
+- Verify mirrored Student/Teacher pages were updated where applicable.
+- Verify navigation links still point to correct view pages.
+- Verify Cory behavior on touched pages.
+- Run a syntax/error check on edited files.
+- Do not commit .DS_Store.
+
+## Prompt Snippet You Can Paste Into Any Tool
+"Before making changes, read .github/copilot-instructions.md, PROJECT_CONTEXT.md, and DESIGN_GUIDELINES.md. Follow those as required project rules for all edits."

+# Coral Keepers Design Guidelines
+
+## 1. Goal
+Keep Coral Keepers visually consistent across Teacher and Student experiences.
+
+Use this file as the design protocol for all future UI edits.
+
+## 2. Core Visual Language
+- Tone: clean, classroom-friendly, ocean-inspired.
+- Geometry: soft rectangles, rounded corners, subtle shadows.
+- Density: moderate whitespace, readable hierarchy, no cramped sections.
+- Contrast: prioritize readability over decorative effects.
+
+## 3. Typography
+- Primary font family: Inter.
+- Headings: medium or semibold weight, clear vertical rhythm.
+- Labels and metadata: small uppercase treatment where already used.
+- Body text: maintain readable line-height and avoid tiny text.
+
+## 4. Color System
+- Primary accent blue: #0075de.
+- Neutral text: #2f3333.
+- Muted text: #5b605f.
+- Background base: #faf9f8.
+- White surface cards: #ffffff.
+
+Guideline:
+- Keep existing color tokens and values unless a change is intentionally global.
+- Do not introduce random one-off hex colors when an existing token/value is available.
+
+## 5. Layout Rules
+- Preserve top navigation height and behavior.
+- Keep page content within established max widths per page.
+- Match vertical spacing patterns already used on sibling pages.
+- For mirrored screens, maintain equal structural spacing in Teacher and Student where intended.
+
+## 6. Card and Surface Style
+- Card corners: small-radius style consistent with existing pages.
+- Borders: light borders with low-contrast neutral color.
+- Shadows: subtle elevation only, avoid heavy blur or deep drop shadows.
+- Avoid mixing radically different card styles within the same screen.
+
+## 7. Buttons and Interactive Controls
+- Primary actions use blue background with white text.
+- Secondary actions stay neutral and low emphasis.
+- Hover and focus states should be visible but not flashy.
+- Keep button height and padding consistent within each page.
+
+## 8. Cory Chat UI Protocol
+Cory is a reusable UI pattern and should remain consistent everywhere it appears.
+
+Required behavior:
+- Trigger in bottom-right corner.
+- Popup opens/closes via trigger, close button, outside click, and Escape key.
+- Empty initial body (no pre-filled conversation line).
+- User bubble: blue, right aligned.
+- Cory bubble: light gray, left aligned.
+- Input supports Enter and Send button.
+
+Current visual positioning standard:
+- Close button top offset: 20px.
+- Pointer right offset: 30px.
+
+## 9. Teacher and Student Consistency Protocol
+When a change applies to both views:
+- Update matching Teacher and Student pages in the same pass.
+- Keep interactions and component behavior equivalent.
+- Preserve route correctness for each view's navigation.
+
+When a change is view-specific:
+- Keep it isolated to the relevant folder.
+- Do not leak Teacher-only UI into Student pages or vice versa.
+
+## 10. Responsive and Accessibility Guardrails
+- Ensure layouts remain usable on narrow widths.
+- Avoid text clipping and horizontal overflow.
+- Maintain keyboard access for interactive controls.
+- Preserve visible focus states.
+- Keep semantic labels and aria attributes already in use.
+
+## 11. Change Acceptance Checklist
+Before finalizing UI edits:
+- Check visual consistency against nearby pages.
+- Verify nav links still target correct view pages.
+- Verify spacing and alignment in both desktop and narrow widths.
+- Verify Cory behavior on every touched page.
+- Run error check on edited files.
+
+## 12. Do Not Do
+- Do not redesign one page into a different visual system.
+- Do not remove shared interaction patterns without replacing them consistently.
+- Do not change asset paths unless all references are updated.
+- Do not commit system files like .DS_Store.

+# Coral Keepers Project Context
+
+## 1. Project Purpose
+Coral Keepers is a two-view web experience for classroom coral education:
+- Teacher view for course management, messaging, assignments, and reading posts.
+- Student view for learning activities, profile, messaging, and calendar.
+
+The project is currently a static multi-page HTML/CSS/JavaScript site with shared assets.
+
+## 2. Top-Level Structure
+- /Teacher: Teacher-facing pages.
+- /Student: Student-facing pages.
+- /assets: Shared images/icons/media.
+- /vercel.json: Deployment config.
+- /.github/copilot-instructions.md: Editing guardrails for this repo.
+
+## 3. Information Architecture
+Teacher pages:
+- index.html
+- course.html
+- course-details.html
+- post-reading.html
+- learn.html
+- calendar.html
+- announcements.html
+- messages.html
+
+Student pages:
+- index.html
+- learn.html
+- calendar.html
+- announcements.html
+- messages.html
+- profile.html
+- is-coral-animal.html
+
+## 4. Critical IA Rules
+- Keep Student and Teacher versions aligned when a change applies to both.
+- Keep version-specific changes only in the matching folder.
+- Preserve all existing relative links and asset paths.
+- Teacher switches and nav must stay inside Teacher routes.
+- Student switches and nav must stay inside Student routes.
+
+## 5. Cory Chat System Contract
+Cory chat appears as a floating button and popup on many pages.
+
+Expected behavior baseline:
+- Opens from bottom-right trigger button.
+- Closes via X button, outside click, and Escape key.
+- Empty initial chat body (no pre-seeded prompt text).
+- User messages on right in blue bubbles.
+- Cory messages on left in light gray bubbles.
+- Message text wraps inside bubble bounds.
+- Enter key and send button both submit.
+
+Expected key selectors and elements:
+- Trigger button: .floating-ai or .cory-trigger depending on page.
+- Popup: #coryPopup
+- Close button: .cory-close
+- Chat body: .cory-body
+- Input: .cory-input
+- Send button: .cory-send
+
+Positioning decisions currently used:
+- Close button top offset: 20px
+- Pointer right offset: 30px
+
+## 6. Known Sensitive Areas
+- Teacher/messages.html has two interactive systems in one script:
+- Message composer logic (new message buttons, class/student targeting, send state)
+- Cory chat logic
+
+If editing Teacher/messages.html:
+- Do not remove compose handlers for .new-message-trigger.
+- Keep compose panel open/close logic intact.
+- Keep Cory logic separate and complete.
+
+## 7. Visual Consistency Notes
+- Student/index.html is the source-of-truth style reference for Cory popup behavior and bubble layout.
+- Teacher/post-reading.html hero banner should match standard teacher banner scale (currently reduced to align with other pages).
+
+## 8. Change Management Checklist
+Before finishing a cross-page update:
+- Confirm mirrored Student/Teacher pages were both updated where applicable.
+- Verify Cory open, close, send, and Enter behavior on touched pages.
+- Verify no broken nav links between Teacher and Student sections.
+- Run a syntax/error check on edited files.
+
+## 9. Git Workflow Notes
+- Avoid committing .DS_Store.
+- Commit only intended files for each task.
+- Push main after confirming changes locally.

+    <div class="cory-pointer" aria-hidden="true"></div>
+    <button class="cory-close" type="button" aria-label="Close Cory chat">×</button>

+      <button class="cory-send" type="button" aria-label="Send">
+        <img src="../assets/bb543680-485a-4fa9-b5ed-481596dd53fd.svg" alt="" />
+      </button>
+    </div>
+  </div>
+
+  <script>
+    function attachCoryChat() {
+      const coryToggle = document.querySelector('.cory-trigger, .floating-ai');
+      const coryPopup = document.getElementById('coryPopup');
+      if (!coryToggle || !coryPopup) return;
+      const coryBody = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-body');
+      const coryInput = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-input');
+      const corySend = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-send');
+      const coryClose = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-close');
+      const isTeacherView = window.location.pathname.includes('/Teacher/');
+      const scrollCoryToLatest = () => { if (coryBody) coryBody.scrollTop = coryBody.scrollHeight; };
+      const appendCoryBubble = (message, role = 'bot', isTyping = false) => {
+        if (!coryBody) return null;
+        const bubble = document.createElement('div');
+        bubble.className = `cory-bubble${role === 'user' ? ' user' : ''}${isTyping ? ' typing' : ''}`;
+        const text = document.createElement('p');
+        text.textContent = message;
+        bubble.appendChild(text);
+        coryBody.appendChild(bubble);
+        scrollCoryToLatest();
+        return bubble;
+      };
+      const getCoryReply = (userMessage) => {
+        const message = userMessage.toLowerCase();
+        if (/(hi|hello|hey)/.test(message)) return 'Hey! I am Cory. Ask me about coral health, tank care, or where to find tools in this app.';
+        if (message.includes('ph')) return 'For most reef tanks, pH is healthiest around 8.1 to 8.4. Big swings are more stressful than small day-to-day changes.';
+        if (message.includes('temperature') || message.includes('temp')) return 'Coral systems usually do best around 76 to 80 degrees F. Keep temperature steady and avoid fast spikes.';
+        if (message.includes('salinity')) return 'Target salinity near 35 ppt. Stability matters the most, so adjust slowly if you need to correct it.';
+        if (message.includes('redox') || message.includes('orp')) return 'Redox (ORP) helps show overall water chemistry stability. Use it as a trend indicator, not a single-pass/fail number.';
+        if (message.includes('health') || message.includes('tank')) return 'A healthy tank usually means stable pH, temperature, salinity, and consistent maintenance. Small regular habits beat big corrections.';
+        if (message.includes('clean') || message.includes('maintenance')) return 'Try a routine: check vitals daily, clean glass as needed, and schedule water changes on a fixed cadence.';
+        if (message.includes('calendar')) return 'Use the Calendar to switch between Month and Day views, then click a date in Day view to jump directly to that day.';
+        if (message.includes('message') || message.includes('chat')) return 'You can use Messages to communicate with your class team. I can also help summarize what to ask or post.';
+        if (message.includes('course') || message.includes('learn') || message.includes('assignment')) return isTeacherView ? 'In Teacher view, open Courses to manage lessons and due dates. Use Post Reading for reading prompts and follow-up tasks.' : 'In Student view, open Learn to check assignments and due dates, then track progress from your dashboard.';
+        if (message.includes('profile')) return 'Open Profile to review your account and class details. You can update info from the edit control there.';
+        if (message.includes('help') || message.includes('what can you do')) return 'I can answer coral-care basics, explain tank metrics, and help you navigate pages like Calendar, Learn/Courses, Messages, and Profile.';
+        return 'I can help with coral care or app navigation. Try asking about pH, salinity, temperature, Calendar, Messages, or Learn/Courses.';
+      };
+      const handleCorySend = () => {
+        if (!coryInput) return;
+        const userMessage = coryInput.value.trim();
+        if (!userMessage) return;
+        appendCoryBubble(userMessage, 'user');
+        coryInput.value = '';
+        const typingBubble = appendCoryBubble('Thinking...', 'bot', true);
+        window.setTimeout(() => {
+          if (typingBubble) typingBubble.remove();
+          appendCoryBubble(getCoryReply(userMessage), 'bot');
+        }, 350);
+      };
+      const setPopupOpen = (open) => {
+        coryPopup.setAttribute('aria-hidden', open ? 'false' : 'true');
+        if (open && coryInput) coryInput.focus();
+      };
+      coryToggle.addEventListener('click', () => { const isOpen = coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'false'; setPopupOpen(!isOpen); });
+
+      coryClose.addEventListener('click', () => {
+        setPopupOpen(false);
+      });
+
+      document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
+        if (coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'true') return;
+        if (!coryPopup.contains(event.target) && !coryToggle.contains(event.target)) setPopupOpen(false);
+      });
+      document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => { if (event.key === 'Escape') setPopupOpen(false); });
+      if (corySend && coryInput && coryBody) {
+        corySend.addEventListener('click', handleCorySend);
+        coryInput.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+          if (event.key === 'Enter') {
+            event.preventDefault();
+            handleCorySend();
+          }
+        });
+      }
+    }
+
+    attachCoryChat();
+
+    const searchInput = document.querySelector('.search-input');
+    if (searchInput) {
+      searchInput.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
+        const query = e.target.value.toLowerCase();
+        const rows = document.querySelectorAll('.row');
+        rows.forEach(row => {
+          const title = row.querySelector('.announcement-title').textContent.toLowerCase();
+          const copy = row.querySelector('.announcement-copy').textContent.toLowerCase();
+          if (title.includes(query) || copy.includes(query)) {
+            row.style.display = 'grid';
+          } else {
+            row.style.display = 'none';
+          }
+        });
+      });
+    }
+  </script>
+</body>
+
+</html>

+        <div class="day-divider"></div>
+        <h2 class="day-title">April 4, 2026</h2>
+
+        <div class="day-timeline">
+          <div class="time-rail" aria-hidden="true">
+            <div>6 AM</div>
+            <div>7 AM</div>
+            <div>8 AM</div>
+            <div>9 AM</div>
+            <div>10 AM</div>
+            <div>11 AM</div>
+            <div>12 PM</div>
+            <div>1 PM</div>
+          </div>
+          <div class="timeline-grid"></div>
+        </div>
+      </div>
+    </section>
+  </main>
+
+  <button class="cory-trigger" aria-label="Cory AI" type="button">
+    <img src="../assets/corychaticon.svg" alt="" />
+  </button>
+
+  <div class="cory-popup" id="coryPopup" role="dialog" aria-label="Cory chat" aria-hidden="true">
+    <div class="cory-pointer" aria-hidden="true"></div>
+    <button class="cory-close" type="button" aria-label="Close Cory chat">×</button>
+    <div class="cory-header">
+      <div class="cory-avatar">
+        <img src="../assets/9e494c12-c6a7-45f9-91ac-f474512b6048.svg" alt="" />
+      </div>
+      <p class="cory-name">Cory</p>
+    </div>
+    <div class="cory-body">
+    </div>
+    <div class="cory-input-row">
+      <input class="cory-input" type="text" placeholder="Type a message..." />
+      <button class="cory-send" type="button" aria-label="Send">
+        <img src="../assets/bb543680-485a-4fa9-b5ed-481596dd53fd.svg" alt="" />
+      </button>
+    </div>
+  </div>
+
+  <script>
+    const calendarShell = document.querySelector('.calendar-shell');
+    const viewButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.view-toggle button');
+    const monthTitleEl = document.querySelector('.month-title');
+    const dayHeaderTitleEl = document.querySelector('.calendar-header-day-title');
+    const dayTitleEl = document.querySelector('.day-title');
+    const monthGridEl = document.querySelector('.calendar-grid');
+    const dayWeekdaysEl = document.querySelector('.day-weekdays');
+    const dayDatesEl = document.querySelector('.day-dates');
+    const dayViewEl = document.querySelector('.calendar-day-view');
+    const monthPrevBtn = document.querySelector('.month-arrow-left');
+    const monthNextBtn = document.querySelector('.month-nav .month-arrow:not(.month-arrow-left)');
+    const dayPrevBtn = document.querySelector('.day-week-arrow.left');
+    const dayNextBtn = document.querySelector('.day-week-arrow.right');
+    const timelineGridEl = document.querySelector('.timeline-grid');
+    const coryToggle = document.querySelector('.cory-trigger');
+    const coryPopup = document.getElementById('coryPopup');
+    const coryBody = document.querySelector('.cory-body');
+    const coryInput = document.querySelector('.cory-input');
+    const corySend = document.querySelector('.cory-send');
+    const coryClose = document.querySelector('.cory-close');
+    const isTeacherView = window.location.pathname.includes('/Teacher/');
+
+    const monthNames = ['January', 'February', 'March', 'April', 'May', 'June', 'July', 'August', 'September', 'October', 'November', 'December'];
+    const weekdayLetters = ['S', 'M', 'T', 'W', 'T', 'F', 'S'];
+    let selectedDate = new Date(2026, 3, 4);
+    const monthEventMap = {
+      '2026-04-04': [
+        { type: 'orange', label: 'Reminder:', text: 'It is your turn to clean the coral tank!' }
+      ],
+      '2026-04-06': [
+        { type: 'blue', label: 'Due:', text: 'Extended Coral...' }
+      ],
+      '2026-04-08': [
+        { type: 'blue', label: 'Due:', text: 'A Symbiosis...' }
+      ],
+      '2026-04-10': [
+        { type: 'blue', label: 'Due:', text: 'Extended Coral...' }
+      ],
+      '2026-04-13': [
+        { type: 'orange', label: 'Reminder:', text: 'It is your...' }
+      ],
+      '2026-04-14': [
+        { type: 'orange', label: 'Reminder:', text: 'It is your...' }
+      ],
+      '2026-04-15': [
+        { type: 'orange', label: 'Reminder:', text: 'It is your...' }
+      ],
+      '2026-04-16': [
+        { type: 'orange', label: 'Reminder:', text: 'It is your...' }
+      ],
+      '2026-04-17': [
+        { type: 'orange', label: 'Reminder:', text: 'It is your...' }
+      ]
+    };
+
+    function dateKey(date) {
+      const y = date.getFullYear();
+      const m = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
+      const d = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
+      return `${y}-${m}-${d}`;
+    }
+
+    function formatMonthYear(date) {
+      return `${monthNames[date.getMonth()]} ${date.getFullYear()}`;
+    }
+
+    function formatDayTitle(date) {
+      return `${monthNames[date.getMonth()]} ${date.getDate()}, ${date.getFullYear()}`;
+    }
+
+    function startOfDay(date) {
+      return new Date(date.getFullYear(), date.getMonth(), date.getDate());
+    }
+
+    function addDays(date, days) {
+      const next = new Date(date);
+      next.setDate(next.getDate() + days);
+      return next;
+    }
+
+    function renderMonthGrid(baseDate) {
+      if (!monthGridEl) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const year = baseDate.getFullYear();
+      const month = baseDate.getMonth();
+      const firstOfMonth = new Date(year, month, 1);
+      const firstCellDate = addDays(firstOfMonth, -firstOfMonth.getDay());
+
+      monthGridEl.innerHTML = '';
+
+      for (let i = 0; i < 42; i += 1) {
+        const cellDate = addDays(firstCellDate, i);
+        const dayCell = document.createElement('div');
+        dayCell.className = 'day';
+
+        if (cellDate.getMonth() !== month) {
+          dayCell.classList.add('spill');
+        }
+
+        const dateNumber = document.createElement('div');
+        dateNumber.className = 'date-number';
+        dateNumber.textContent = String(cellDate.getDate());
+        dayCell.appendChild(dateNumber);
+
+        if (cellDate.getMonth() === month) {
+          const events = monthEventMap[dateKey(cellDate)] || [];
+          events.forEach((eventData) => {
+            const eventEl = document.createElement('div');
+            eventEl.className = `event ${eventData.type}`;
+            eventEl.innerHTML = `<span class="label">${eventData.label}</span><span class="text">${eventData.text}</span>`;
+            dayCell.appendChild(eventEl);
+          });
+        }
+
+        monthGridEl.appendChild(dayCell);
+      }
+    }
+
+    function renderDayStrip(baseDate) {
+      if (!dayDatesEl || !dayWeekdaysEl) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      dayWeekdaysEl.innerHTML = '';
+      dayDatesEl.innerHTML = '';
+      const stripStart = addDays(baseDate, -3);
+
+      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i += 1) {
+        const dayDate = addDays(stripStart, i);
+        const weekdayNode = document.createElement('div');
+        weekdayNode.textContent = weekdayLetters[dayDate.getDay()];
+        dayWeekdaysEl.appendChild(weekdayNode);
+
+        const dayNode = document.createElement('div');
+        dayNode.textContent = String(dayDate.getDate());
+        dayNode.dataset.date = dateKey(dayDate);
+
+        if (i === 3) {
+          dayNode.className = 'selected';
+        }
+
+        dayDatesEl.appendChild(dayNode);
+      }
+    }
+
+    function renderDayActivity(baseDate) {
+      if (!timelineGridEl) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const events = monthEventMap[dateKey(baseDate)] || [];
+      const hourStart = 6;
+      const slotHeight = 54;
+
+      timelineGridEl.innerHTML = '';
+
+      if (events.length === 0) {
+        const noActivityEl = document.createElement('div');
+        noActivityEl.className = 'timeline-event orange';
+        noActivityEl.style.top = '6px';
+        noActivityEl.innerHTML = '<span class="label">No Activity:</span><span class="text">No scheduled activities for this day.</span>';
+        timelineGridEl.appendChild(noActivityEl);
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const slotUsage = {};
+
+      events.forEach((eventData, index) => {
+        const eventEl = document.createElement('div');
+        eventEl.className = `timeline-event ${eventData.type || 'blue'}`;
+        eventEl.innerHTML = `<span class="label">${eventData.label}</span><span class="text">${eventData.text}</span>`;
+
+        const match = eventData.label.match(/(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})\s*(AM|PM)/i);
+        let top;
+
+        if (match) {
+          let hour = Number(match[1]);
+          const minute = Number(match[2]);
+          const period = match[3].toUpperCase();
+
+          if (period === 'PM' && hour !== 12) {
+            hour += 12;
+          }
+          if (period === 'AM' && hour === 12) {
+            hour = 0;
+          }
+
+          const timeKey = `${hour}:${minute}`;
+          const overlap = slotUsage[timeKey] || 0;
+          slotUsage[timeKey] = overlap + 1;
+          top = ((hour - hourStart) * slotHeight) + ((minute / 60) * slotHeight) + 6 + (overlap * 14);
+        } else {
+          top = 6 + (index * 44);
+        }
+
+        eventEl.style.top = `${Math.max(6, top)}px`;
+        timelineGridEl.appendChild(eventEl);
+      });
+    }
+
+    function renderCalendar() {
+      monthTitleEl.textContent = formatMonthYear(selectedDate);
+      dayHeaderTitleEl.textContent = formatMonthYear(selectedDate);
+      dayTitleEl.textContent = formatDayTitle(selectedDate);
+      dayViewEl.setAttribute('aria-label', `${formatDayTitle(selectedDate)} day view`);
+      renderMonthGrid(selectedDate);
+      renderDayStrip(selectedDate);
+      renderDayActivity(selectedDate);
+    }
+
+    function setCalendarView(view) {
+      const isDay = view === 'day';
+      calendarShell.classList.toggle('is-day', isDay);
+
+      viewButtons.forEach((button) => {
+        const active = button.dataset.view === view;
+        button.classList.toggle('active', active);
+        button.classList.toggle('inactive', !active);
+      });
+    }
+
+    viewButtons.forEach((button) => {
+      button.addEventListener('click', () => {
+        setCalendarView(button.dataset.view);
+      });
+    });
+
+    monthPrevBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
+      selectedDate = new Date(selectedDate.getFullYear(), selectedDate.getMonth() - 1, selectedDate.getDate());
+      renderCalendar();
+    });
+
+    monthNextBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
+      selectedDate = new Date(selectedDate.getFullYear(), selectedDate.getMonth() + 1, selectedDate.getDate());
+      renderCalendar();
+    });
+
+    dayPrevBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
+      selectedDate = addDays(startOfDay(selectedDate), -1);
+      renderCalendar();
+    });
+
+    dayNextBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
+      selectedDate = addDays(startOfDay(selectedDate), 1);
+      renderCalendar();
+    });
+
+    dayDatesEl.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
+      const dayNode = event.target.closest('div[data-date]');
+      if (!dayNode) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const [y, m, d] = dayNode.dataset.date.split('-').map(Number);
+      selectedDate = new Date(y, m - 1, d);
+      renderCalendar();
+    });
+
+    renderCalendar();
+
+    function scrollCoryToLatest() {
+      if (coryBody) {
+        coryBody.scrollTop = coryBody.scrollHeight;
+      }
+    }
+
+    function appendCoryBubble(message, role = 'bot', isTyping = false) {
+      if (!coryBody) {
+        return null;
+      }
+
+      const bubble = document.createElement('div');
+      bubble.className = `cory-bubble${role === 'user' ? ' user' : ''}${isTyping ? ' typing' : ''}`;
+
+      const text = document.createElement('p');
+      text.textContent = message;
+      bubble.appendChild(text);
+
+      coryBody.appendChild(bubble);
+      scrollCoryToLatest();
+      return bubble;
+    }
+
+    function getCoryReply(userMessage) {
+      const message = userMessage.toLowerCase();
+
+      if (/(hi|hello|hey)/.test(message)) {
+        return 'Hey! I am Cory. Ask me about coral health, tank care, or where to find tools in this app.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('ph')) {
+        return 'For most reef tanks, pH is healthiest around 8.1 to 8.4. Big swings are more stressful than small day-to-day changes.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('temperature') || message.includes('temp')) {
+        return 'Coral systems usually do best around 76 to 80 degrees F. Keep temperature steady and avoid fast spikes.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('salinity')) {
+        return 'Target salinity near 35 ppt. Stability matters the most, so adjust slowly if you need to correct it.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('redox') || message.includes('orp')) {
+        return 'Redox (ORP) helps show overall water chemistry stability. Use it as a trend indicator, not a single-pass/fail number.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('health') || message.includes('tank')) {
+        return 'A healthy tank usually means stable pH, temperature, salinity, and consistent maintenance. Small regular habits beat big corrections.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('clean') || message.includes('maintenance')) {
+        return 'Try a routine: check vitals daily, clean glass as needed, and schedule water changes on a fixed cadence.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('calendar')) {
+        return 'Use the Calendar to switch between Month and Day views, then click a date in Day view to jump directly to that day.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('message') || message.includes('chat')) {
+        return 'You can use Messages to communicate with your class team. I can also help summarize what to ask or post.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('course') || message.includes('learn') || message.includes('assignment')) {
+        return isTeacherView
+          ? 'In Teacher view, open Courses to manage lessons and due dates. Use Post Reading for reading prompts and follow-up tasks.'
+          : 'In Student view, open Learn to check assignments and due dates, then track progress from your dashboard.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('profile')) {
+        return 'Open Profile to review your account and class details. You can update info from the edit control there.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('help') || message.includes('what can you do')) {
+        return 'I can answer coral-care basics, explain tank metrics, and help you navigate pages like Calendar, Learn/Courses, Messages, and Profile.';
+      }
+
+      return 'I can help with coral care or app navigation. Try asking about pH, salinity, temperature, Calendar, Messages, or Learn/Courses.';
+    }
+
+    function handleCorySend() {
+      if (!coryInput) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const userMessage = coryInput.value.trim();
+      if (!userMessage) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      appendCoryBubble(userMessage, 'user');
+      coryInput.value = '';
+
+      const typingBubble = appendCoryBubble('Thinking...', 'bot', true);
+      window.setTimeout(() => {
+        if (typingBubble) {
+          typingBubble.remove();
+        }
+        appendCoryBubble(getCoryReply(userMessage), 'bot');
+      }, 350);
+    }
+
+    function setPopupOpen(open) {
+      coryPopup.setAttribute('aria-hidden', open ? 'false' : 'true');
+      if (open && coryInput) {
+        coryInput.focus();
+      }
+    }
+
+    coryToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
+      const isOpen = coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'false';
+      setPopupOpen(!isOpen);
+    });
+
+    coryClose.addEventListener('click', () => {
+      setPopupOpen(false);
+    });
+
+    document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
+      if (coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'true') {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      if (!coryPopup.contains(event.target) && !coryToggle.contains(event.target)) {
+        setPopupOpen(false);
+      }
+    });
+
+    document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+      if (event.key === 'Escape') {
+        setPopupOpen(false);
+      }
+    });
+
+    if (corySend && coryInput && coryBody) {
+      corySend.addEventListener('click', handleCorySend);
+      coryInput.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+        if (event.key === 'Enter') {
+          event.preventDefault();
+          handleCorySend();
+        }
+      });
+    }
+  </script>
+</body>
+</html>

+            <p>Due to recent algae overgrowth in the tank, some extra cleaning might be necessary.</p>
+          </div>
+          <div class="vh-pred-item">
+            <h4>Filter Replacement Alert</h4>
+            <p>The aquarium filter should be checked and possibly replaced to maintain water quality.</p>
+          </div>
+          <div class="vh-pred-item">
+            <h4>Temperature Adjustment Required</h4>
+            <p>Temperature fluctuations detected; consider adjusting the heater to stabilize the environment.</p>
+          </div>
+        </section>
+      </div>
+
+      <section class="vh-readiness">
+        <h3 class="vh-h3">Coral Readiness Meter</h3>
+        <img class="vh-readiness-strip" src="../assets/vital-history-6a9df19e881abb09e656fdcd60cbaf2fc8d9412c.svg" alt="Coral readiness stages" />
+        <div class="vh-status">
+          <div>
+            <p class="vh-status-label"><img src="../assets/vital-history-8176ea54be1274f68a8d668fd3e38fe072edc1d6.svg" alt="" />Current Status</p>
+            <h4 style="color:#2f3333;font-size:30px;line-height:32px;">Attachment Stage</h4>
+            <p class="vh-status-copy">keep monitoring! Stable conditions will ensure your coral thrives!</p>
+          </div>
+          <div class="vh-divider"></div>
+          <div>
+            <p class="vh-status-label">Readiness Score</p>
+            <h4>12%</h4>
+            <div class="vh-progress"><span></span></div>
+            <p class="vh-status-note">On the path to restoration!</p>
+          </div>
+        </div>
+      </section>
+    </div>
+  </div>
+
+  <div class="cory-popup" id="coryPopup" role="dialog" aria-label="Cory chat" aria-hidden="true">
+    <div class="cory-pointer" aria-hidden="true"></div>
+    <button class="cory-close" type="button" aria-label="Close Cory chat">×</button>
+    <div class="cory-header">
+      <div class="cory-avatar">
+        <img src="../assets/9e494c12-c6a7-45f9-91ac-f474512b6048.svg" alt="" />
+      </div>
+      <p class="cory-name">Cory</p>
+    </div>
+    <div class="cory-body">
+    </div>
+    <div class="cory-input-row">
+      <input class="cory-input" type="text" placeholder="Type a message..." />
+      <button class="cory-send" type="button" aria-label="Send">
+        <img src="../assets/bb543680-485a-4fa9-b5ed-481596dd53fd.svg" alt="" />
+      </button>
+    </div>
+  </div>
+
+  <script>
+    const coryToggle = document.querySelector('.floating-ai');
+    const coryPopup = document.getElementById('coryPopup');
+    const vitalHistoryTrigger = document.querySelector('.vitals-history');
+    const vitalHistoryModal = document.getElementById('vitalHistoryModal');
+    const vitalHistoryClose = document.querySelector('.vitals-history-close');
+    const coryBody = document.querySelector('.cory-body');
+    const coryInput = document.querySelector('.cory-input');
+    const corySend = document.querySelector('.cory-send');
+    const coryClose = document.querySelector('.cory-close');
+    const isTeacherView = window.location.pathname.includes('/Teacher/');
+
+    function scrollCoryToLatest() {
+      if (coryBody) {
+        coryBody.scrollTop = coryBody.scrollHeight;
+      }
+    }
+
+    function appendCoryBubble(message, role = 'bot', isTyping = false) {
+      if (!coryBody) {
+        return null;
+      }
+
+      const bubble = document.createElement('div');
+      bubble.className = `cory-bubble${role === 'user' ? ' user' : ''}${isTyping ? ' typing' : ''}`;
+
+      const text = document.createElement('p');
+      text.textContent = message;
+      bubble.appendChild(text);
+
+      coryBody.appendChild(bubble);
+      scrollCoryToLatest();
+      return bubble;
+    }
+
+    function getCoryReply(userMessage) {
+      const message = userMessage.toLowerCase();
+
+      if (/(hi|hello|hey)/.test(message)) {
+        return 'Hey! I am Cory. Ask me about coral health, tank care, or where to find tools in this app.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('ph')) {
+        return 'For most reef tanks, pH is healthiest around 8.1 to 8.4. Big swings are more stressful than small day-to-day changes.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('temperature') || message.includes('temp')) {
+        return 'Coral systems usually do best around 76 to 80 degrees F. Keep temperature steady and avoid fast spikes.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('salinity')) {
+        return 'Target salinity near 35 ppt. Stability matters the most, so adjust slowly if you need to correct it.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('redox') || message.includes('orp')) {
+        return 'Redox (ORP) helps show overall water chemistry stability. Use it as a trend indicator, not a single-pass/fail number.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('health') || message.includes('tank')) {
+        return 'A healthy tank usually means stable pH, temperature, salinity, and consistent maintenance. Small regular habits beat big corrections.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('clean') || message.includes('maintenance')) {
+        return 'Try a routine: check vitals daily, clean glass as needed, and schedule water changes on a fixed cadence.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('calendar')) {
+        return 'Use the Calendar to switch between Month and Day views, then click a date in Day view to jump directly to that day.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('message') || message.includes('chat')) {
+        return 'You can use Messages to communicate with your class team. I can also help summarize what to ask or post.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('course') || message.includes('learn') || message.includes('assignment')) {
+        return isTeacherView
+          ? 'In Teacher view, open Courses to manage lessons and due dates. Use Post Reading for reading prompts and follow-up tasks.'
+          : 'In Student view, open Learn to check assignments and due dates, then track progress from your dashboard.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('profile')) {
+        return 'Open Profile to review your account and class details. You can update info from the edit control there.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('help') || message.includes('what can you do')) {
+        return 'I can answer coral-care basics, explain tank metrics, and help you navigate pages like Calendar, Learn/Courses, Messages, and Profile.';
+      }
+
+      return 'I can help with coral care or app navigation. Try asking about pH, salinity, temperature, Calendar, Messages, or Learn/Courses.';
+    }
+
+    function handleCorySend() {
+      if (!coryInput) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const userMessage = coryInput.value.trim();
+      if (!userMessage) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      appendCoryBubble(userMessage, 'user');
+      coryInput.value = '';
+
+      const typingBubble = appendCoryBubble('Thinking...', 'bot', true);
+      window.setTimeout(() => {
+        if (typingBubble) {
+          typingBubble.remove();
+        }
+        appendCoryBubble(getCoryReply(userMessage), 'bot');
+      }, 350);
+    }
+
+    function setPopupOpen(open) {
+      coryPopup.setAttribute('aria-hidden', open ? 'false' : 'true');
+      if (open && coryInput) {
+        coryInput.focus();
+      }
+    }
+
+    function setVitalHistoryOpen(open) {
+      if (!vitalHistoryModal) {
+        return;
+      }
+      vitalHistoryModal.setAttribute('aria-hidden', open ? 'false' : 'true');
+      document.body.style.overflow = open ? 'hidden' : '';
+    }
+
+    coryToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
+      const isOpen = coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'false';
+      setPopupOpen(!isOpen);
+    });
+
+    coryClose.addEventListener('click', () => {
+      setPopupOpen(false);
+    });
+
+    if (vitalHistoryTrigger && vitalHistoryClose && vitalHistoryModal) {
+      vitalHistoryTrigger.addEventListener('click', () => {
+        setVitalHistoryOpen(true);
+      });
+
+      vitalHistoryClose.addEventListener('click', () => {
+        setVitalHistoryOpen(false);
+      });
+
+      vitalHistoryModal.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
+        if (event.target === vitalHistoryModal) {
+          setVitalHistoryOpen(false);
+        }
+      });
+    }
+
+    document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {      if (coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'true') {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      if (!coryPopup.contains(event.target) && !coryToggle.contains(event.target)) {
+        setPopupOpen(false);
+      }
+    });
+
+    document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+      if (event.key === 'Escape') {
+        setVitalHistoryOpen(false);
+        setPopupOpen(false);
+      }
+    });
+
+    if (corySend && coryInput && coryBody) {
+      corySend.addEventListener('click', handleCorySend);
+      coryInput.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+        if (event.key === 'Enter') {
+          event.preventDefault();
+          handleCorySend();
+        }
+      });
+      scrollCoryToLatest();
+    }
+
+    const healthEl = document.querySelector('.pct');
+    const deltaArrowEl = document.querySelector('.delta-arrow');
+    const deltaValueEl = document.querySelector('.delta-value');
+    const tempTrendArrowEl = document.querySelector('.temp-trend .trend-arrow');
+    const tempTrendValueEl = document.querySelector('.temp-trend .trend-value');
+    const salTrendArrowEl = document.querySelector('.sal-trend .trend-arrow');
+    const salTrendValueEl = document.querySelector('.sal-trend .trend-value');
+    const vitalValueEls = document.querySelectorAll('.vital .vital-value');
+    const vitalBackCopyEls = document.querySelectorAll('.vital .vital-back-copy');
+
+    if (healthEl && deltaArrowEl && deltaValueEl && tempTrendArrowEl && tempTrendValueEl && salTrendArrowEl && salTrendValueEl && vitalValueEls.length >= 4) {
+      const metrics = {
+        health: 92,
+        temp: 77.9,
+        ph: 8.32,
+        salinity: 34,
+        redox: 372
+      };
+
+      const bounds = {
+        health: [70, 100],
+        temp: [72, 84],
+        ph: [7.8, 8.8],
+        salinity: [30, 40],
+        redox: [300, 450]
+      };
+
+      function clamp(value, min, max) {
+        return Math.min(max, Math.max(min, value));
+      }
+
+      function jitterByPercent(value) {
+        const pct = (Math.random() * 4) - 2;
+        return {
+          value: value * (1 + (pct / 100)),
+          pct
+        };
+      }
+
+      function arrowFor(changePct) {
+        if (changePct > 0.05) {
+          return '↑';
+        }
+        if (changePct < -0.05) {
+          return '↓';
+        }
+        return '→';
+      }
+
+      function render(deltas) {
+        healthEl.textContent = `${Math.round(metrics.health)}%`;
+        deltaArrowEl.textContent = arrowFor(deltas.health);
+        deltaValueEl.textContent = `${Math.abs(deltas.health).toFixed(1)}%`;
+
+        tempTrendArrowEl.textContent = arrowFor(deltas.temp);
+        tempTrendValueEl.textContent = `${Math.abs(deltas.temp).toFixed(1)}°`;
+
+        salTrendArrowEl.textContent = arrowFor(deltas.salinity);
+        salTrendValueEl.textContent = `${Math.abs(deltas.salinity).toFixed(1)} ppt`;
+
+        vitalValueEls[0].textContent = `${metrics.temp.toFixed(1)}°F`;
+        vitalValueEls[1].textContent = metrics.ph.toFixed(2);
+        vitalValueEls[2].textContent = `${Math.round(metrics.salinity)} ppt`;
+        vitalValueEls[3].textContent = `${Math.round(metrics.redox)} mV`;
+
+        if (vitalBackCopyEls.length >= 4) {
+          vitalBackCopyEls[2].textContent = `Your salinity is currently ${Math.round(metrics.salinity)} ppt. Stability is key for a thriving reef, and you're nailing it!`;
+          vitalBackCopyEls[3].textContent = `Redox is looking great at ${Math.round(metrics.redox)} mV. High oxygen levels mean your corals are breathing easy!`;
+        }
+      }
+
+      function tick() {
+        const healthUpdate = jitterByPercent(metrics.health);
+        metrics.health = clamp(healthUpdate.value, bounds.health[0], bounds.health[1]);
+
+        const tempUpdate = jitterByPercent(metrics.temp);
+        metrics.temp = clamp(tempUpdate.value, bounds.temp[0], bounds.temp[1]);
+        metrics.ph = clamp(jitterByPercent(metrics.ph).value, bounds.ph[0], bounds.ph[1]);
+        const salinityUpdate = jitterByPercent(metrics.salinity);
+        metrics.salinity = clamp(salinityUpdate.value, bounds.salinity[0], bounds.salinity[1]);
+        metrics.redox = clamp(jitterByPercent(metrics.redox).value, bounds.redox[0], bounds.redox[1]);
+
+        render({
+          health: healthUpdate.pct,
+          temp: tempUpdate.pct,
+          salinity: salinityUpdate.pct
+        });
+        window.setTimeout(tick, 6000 + (Math.random() * 1000));
+      }
+
+      render({
+        health: 0,
+        temp: 0,
+        salinity: 0
+      });
+      window.setTimeout(tick, 6000 + (Math.random() * 1000));
+    }
+  </script>
+</body>
+</html>

+
+  <script>
+    function attachCoryChat() {
+      const coryToggle = document.querySelector('.floating-ai');
+      const coryPopup = document.getElementById('coryPopup');
+      if (!coryToggle || !coryPopup) return;
+      const coryBody = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-body');
+      const coryInput = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-input');
+      const corySend = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-send');
+      const coryClose = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-close');
+      const scrollCoryToLatest = () => { if (coryBody) coryBody.scrollTop = coryBody.scrollHeight; };
+      const appendCoryBubble = (message, role = 'bot', isTyping = false) => {
+        if (!coryBody) return null;
+        const bubble = document.createElement('div');
+        bubble.className = `cory-bubble${role === 'user' ? ' user' : ''}${isTyping ? ' typing' : ''}`;
+        const text = document.createElement('p');
+        text.textContent = message;
+        bubble.appendChild(text);
+        coryBody.appendChild(bubble);
+        scrollCoryToLatest();
+        return bubble;
+      };
+      const getCoryReply = (userMessage) => {
+        const message = userMessage.toLowerCase();
+        if (/(hi|hello|hey)/.test(message)) return 'Hey! I am Cory. Ask me about coral health, tank care, or where to find tools in this app.';
+        if (message.includes('coral') || message.includes('animal')) return 'Coral are animals, not plants. They live as colonies of polyps and often rely on symbiotic algae for energy.';
+        if (message.includes('pH')) return 'For most reef tanks, pH is healthiest around 8.1 to 8.4. Big swings are more stressful than small day-to-day changes.';
+        if (message.includes('calendar')) return 'Use the Calendar to switch between Month and Day views, then click a date in Day view to jump directly to that day.';
+        return 'I can help with coral care or app navigation. Try asking about coral biology, pH, temperature, Calendar, Messages, or Learn/Courses.';
+      };
+      const handleCorySend = () => {
+        if (!coryInput) return;
+        const userMessage = coryInput.value.trim();
+        if (!userMessage) return;
+        appendCoryBubble(userMessage, 'user');
+        coryInput.value = '';
+        const typingBubble = appendCoryBubble('Thinking...', 'bot', true);
+        window.setTimeout(() => {
+          if (typingBubble) typingBubble.remove();
+          appendCoryBubble(getCoryReply(userMessage), 'bot');
+        }, 350);
+      };
+      const setPopupOpen = (open) => {
+        coryPopup.setAttribute('aria-hidden', open ? 'false' : 'true');
+        if (open && coryInput) coryInput.focus();
+      };
+      coryToggle.addEventListener('click', () => { const isOpen = coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'false'; setPopupOpen(!isOpen); });
+
+      coryClose.addEventListener('click', () => {
+        setPopupOpen(false);
+      });
+
+      document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
+        if (coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'true') return;
+        if (!coryPopup.contains(event.target) && !coryToggle.contains(event.target)) setPopupOpen(false);
+      });
+      document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => { if (event.key === 'Escape') setPopupOpen(false); });
+      if (corySend && coryInput && coryBody) {
+        corySend.addEventListener('click', handleCorySend);
+        coryInput.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+          if (event.key === 'Enter') { event.preventDefault(); handleCorySend(); }
+        });
+      }
+    }
+
+    attachCoryChat();
+  </script>
+</body>
+</html>

+  <div class="cory-popup" id="coryPopup" role="dialog" aria-label="Cory chat" aria-hidden="true">
+    <div class="cory-pointer" aria-hidden="true"></div>
+    <button class="cory-close" type="button" aria-label="Close Cory chat">×</button>
+    <div class="cory-header">
+      <div class="cory-avatar">
+        <img src="../assets/9e494c12-c6a7-45f9-91ac-f474512b6048.svg" alt="" />
+      </div>
+      <p class="cory-name">Cory</p>
+    </div>
+    <div class="cory-body">
+    </div>
+    <div class="cory-input-row">
+      <input class="cory-input" type="text" placeholder="Type a message..." />
+      <button class="cory-send" type="button" aria-label="Send">
+        <img src="../assets/bb543680-485a-4fa9-b5ed-481596dd53fd.svg" alt="" />
+      </button>
+    </div>
+  </div>
+
+  <script>
+    function attachCoryChat() {
+      const coryToggle = document.querySelector('.floating-ai, .cory-trigger');
+      const coryPopup = document.getElementById('coryPopup');
+      if (!coryToggle || !coryPopup) return;
+      const coryBody = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-body');
+      const coryInput = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-input');
+      const corySend = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-send');
+      const coryClose = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-close');
+      const isTeacherView = window.location.pathname.includes('/Teacher/');
+      const scrollCoryToLatest = () => { if (coryBody) coryBody.scrollTop = coryBody.scrollHeight; };
+      const appendCoryBubble = (message, role = 'bot', isTyping = false) => {
+        if (!coryBody) return null;
+        const bubble = document.createElement('div');
+        bubble.className = `cory-bubble${role === 'user' ? ' user' : ''}${isTyping ? ' typing' : ''}`;
+        const text = document.createElement('p');
+        text.textContent = message;
+        bubble.appendChild(text);
+        coryBody.appendChild(bubble);
+        scrollCoryToLatest();
+        return bubble;
+      };
+      const getCoryReply = (userMessage) => {
+        const message = userMessage.toLowerCase();
+        if (/(hi|hello|hey)/.test(message)) return 'Hey! I am Cory. Ask me about coral health, tank care, or where to find tools in this app.';
+        if (message.includes('ph')) return 'For most reef tanks, pH is healthiest around 8.1 to 8.4. Big swings are more stressful than small day-to-day changes.';
+        if (message.includes('temperature') || message.includes('temp')) return 'Coral systems usually do best around 76 to 80 degrees F. Keep temperature steady and avoid fast spikes.';
+        if (message.includes('salinity')) return 'Target salinity near 35 ppt. Stability matters the most, so adjust slowly if you need to correct it.';
+        if (message.includes('redox') || message.includes('orp')) return 'Redox (ORP) helps show overall water chemistry stability. Use it as a trend indicator, not a single-pass/fail number.';
+        if (message.includes('health') || message.includes('tank')) return 'A healthy tank usually means stable pH, temperature, salinity, and consistent maintenance. Small regular habits beat big corrections.';
+        if (message.includes('clean') || message.includes('maintenance')) return 'Try a routine: check vitals daily, clean glass as needed, and schedule water changes on a fixed cadence.';
+        if (message.includes('calendar')) return 'Use the Calendar to switch between Month and Day views, then click a date in Day view to jump directly to that day.';
+        if (message.includes('message') || message.includes('chat')) return 'You can use Messages to communicate with your class team. I can also help summarize what to ask or post.';
+        if (message.includes('course') || message.includes('learn') || message.includes('assignment')) return isTeacherView ? 'In Teacher view, open Courses to manage lessons and due dates. Use Post Reading for reading prompts and follow-up tasks.' : 'In Student view, open Learn to check assignments and due dates, then track progress from your dashboard.';
+        if (message.includes('profile')) return 'Open Profile to review your account and class details. You can update info from the edit control there.';
+        if (message.includes('help') || message.includes('what can you do')) return 'I can answer coral-care basics, explain tank metrics, and help you navigate pages like Calendar, Learn/Courses, Messages, and Profile.';
+        return 'I can help with coral care or app navigation. Try asking about pH, salinity, temperature, Calendar, Messages, or Learn/Courses.';
+      };
+      const handleCorySend = () => {
+        if (!coryInput) return;
+        const userMessage = coryInput.value.trim();
+        if (!userMessage) return;
+        appendCoryBubble(userMessage, 'user');
+        coryInput.value = '';
+        const typingBubble = appendCoryBubble('Thinking...', 'bot', true);
+        window.setTimeout(() => {
+          if (typingBubble) typingBubble.remove();
+          appendCoryBubble(getCoryReply(userMessage), 'bot');
+        }, 350);
+      };
+      const setPopupOpen = (open) => {
+        coryPopup.setAttribute('aria-hidden', open ? 'false' : 'true');
+        if (open && coryInput) coryInput.focus();
+      };
+      coryToggle.addEventListener('click', () => { const isOpen = coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'false'; setPopupOpen(!isOpen); });
+
+      coryClose.addEventListener('click', () => {
+        setPopupOpen(false);
+      });
+
+      document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
+        if (coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'true') return;
+        if (!coryPopup.contains(event.target) && !coryToggle.contains(event.target)) setPopupOpen(false);
+      });
+      document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => { if (event.key === 'Escape') setPopupOpen(false); });
+      if (corySend && coryInput && coryBody) {
+        corySend.addEventListener('click', handleCorySend);
+        coryInput.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+          if (event.key === 'Enter') {
+            event.preventDefault();
+            handleCorySend();
+          }
+        });
+      }
+    }
+
+    attachCoryChat();
+  </script>
+</body>
+</html>

+      background: #f3f4f2;
+      padding: 8px 12px 9px;
+      font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
+      font-size: 12px;
+      font-weight: 400;
+      color: #111827;
+      outline: none;
+    }
+
+    .cory-input::placeholder {
+      color: #6b7280;
+      opacity: 1;
+    }
+
+    .cory-send {
+      width: 30px;
+      height: 30px;

+        margin-top: auto;
+        padding-bottom: 32px;
+      }

+      .menu-toggle.open span:nth-child(2) { opacity: 0; }
+      .menu-toggle.open span:nth-child(3) { transform: translateY(-7px) rotate(-45deg); }
+    }
+
+  </style>
+</head>
+<body>
+  <header class="top-nav">
+    <div class="top-nav-inner">
+      <a href="index.html" aria-label="Go to Home">
+        
+      
+      <button class="menu-toggle" aria-label="Toggle menu" onclick="this.classList.toggle('open'); document.querySelector('.nav-links').classList.toggle('open')">
+        <span></span>
+        <span></span>
+        <span></span>
+      </button>
+      <img class="brand" src="../assets/2dba0c49-862f-4c15-b5d9-21bc7ebd0bbd.svg" alt="Coral Keepers" />
+      </a>
+      <nav class="nav-links" aria-label="Primary">
+        <a class="nav-link" href="index.html">Home</a>
+        <a class="nav-link" href="learn.html">Learn</a>
+        <a class="nav-link" href="announcements.html">Announcements</a>
+        <a class="nav-link" href="calendar.html">Calendar</a>
+        <a class="nav-link messages-tab active" href="messages.html">Messages</a>
+        <a class="nav-link profile-tab" href="profile.html">Profile</a>
+              <a class="nav-link switch" href="../Teacher/index.html">
+          <span>Student View</span>
+          <span class="switch-icon" aria-hidden="true">
+            <img src="../assets/teacher-switch-blue.svg" alt="" width="16" height="16" />
+          </span>
+        </a>
+      </nav>
+    </div>
+  </header>
+
+  <main class="messages-page">
+    <div class="board-shell">
+      <div class="page-tools">
+        <div class="search-bar">
+          <img class="search-icon" src="../assets/Search.svg" alt="" />
+          <input class="search-input" type="search" placeholder="Search messages..." aria-label="Search messages" />
+        </div>
+        <button class="tool-btn filter-btn" type="button" aria-label="Filter messages">
+          <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 3200 3200" fill="#2f3333" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
+            <path d="M1000,300c-186.3,0 -342.889,127.503 -387.305,300l-312.695,0c-55.2,0 -100,44.8 -100,100c0,55.2 44.8,100 100,100l312.695,0c44.416,172.497 201.005,300 387.305,300c186.3,0 342.889,-127.503 387.305,-300l1512.69,0c55.2,0 100,-44.8 100,-100c0,-55.2 -44.8,-100 -100,-100l-1512.69,0c-44.416,-172.497 -201.005,-300 -387.305,-300Zm0,200c110.4,0 200,89.6 200,200c0,110.4 -89.6,200 -200,200c-110.4,0 -200,-89.6 -200,-200c0,-110.4 89.6,-200 200,-200Zm1200,700c-186.3,0 -342.889,127.503 -387.305,300l-1512.69,0c-55.2,0 -100,44.8 -100,100c0,55.2 44.8,100 100,100l1512.69,0c44.416,172.497 201.005,300 387.305,300c186.3,0 342.889,-127.503 387.305,-300l312.695,0c55.2,0 100,-44.8 100,-100c0,-55.2 -44.8,-100 -100,-100l-312.695,0c-44.416,-172.497 -201.005,-300 -387.305,-300Zm0,200c110.4,0 200,89.6 200,200c0,110.4 -89.6,200 -200,200c-110.4,0 -200,-89.6 -200,-200c0,-110.4 89.6,-200 200,-200Zm-1200,700c-186.3,0 -342.889,127.503 -387.305,300l-312.695,0c-55.2,0 -100,44.8 -100,100c0,55.2 44.8,100 100,100l312.695,0c44.416,172.497 201.005,300 387.305,300c186.3,0 342.889,-127.503 387.305,-300l1512.69,0c55.2,0 100,-44.8 100,-100c0,-55.2 -44.8,-100 -100,-100l-1512.69,0c-44.416,-172.497 -201.005,-300 -387.305,-300Zm0,200c110.4,0 200,89.6 200,200c0,110.4 -89.6,200 -200,200c-110.4,0 -200,-89.6 -200,-200c0,-110.4 89.6,-200 200,-200Z" />
+          </svg>
+        </button>
+      </div>
+
+      <section class="board">
+        <h1 class="section-title">Messages</h1>
+
+        <div class="list">
+          <div class="row">
+            <div class="contact">
+              <div class="avatar blue"><img src="../assets/6cfa3752-8668-45dd-840a-04566340856c.svg" alt="" /></div>
+              <p class="name">Emmaline Kim</p>
+            </div>
+            <p class="date">4/6/26, 3:05 PM</p>
+            <p class="preview">Hey Jessica! I was just wondering if you need a study partner for Mr. Smith’s Coral...</p>
+          </div>
+
+          <div class="row">
+            <div class="contact">
+              <div class="avatar pink"><img src="../assets/0690951b-a0a0-42be-9f09-ca2e496b3780.svg" alt="" /></div>

+            <div class="contact">
+              <div class="avatar green"><img src="../assets/8a1d99b7-8234-48b5-a3e9-a5a144998c48.svg" alt="" /></div>
+              <p class="name">Aisha Patel</p>
+            </div>
+            <p class="date">4/6/26, 3:20 PM</p>
+            <p class="preview">Hello Aisha, would you like to collaborate on the project due next week?</p>
+          </div>
+        </div>
+
+        <button class="new-btn">New Message</button>
+
+        <section class="compose-panel" id="composePanel" aria-hidden="true">
+          <button class="compose-close" type="button" aria-label="Close compose">×</button>
+
+          <form class="compose-form" id="composeForm">
+            <div class="to-row">
+              <label class="to-label" for="recipientInput">To:</label>
+              <div class="to-field-wrap">
+                <input class="to-input" id="recipientInput" type="text" autocomplete="off" placeholder="Who do you want to message?" />
+                <div class="recipient-list" id="recipientList" role="listbox" aria-label="Recipient suggestions"></div>
+              </div>
+            </div>
+
+            <textarea class="message-input" id="messageInput" placeholder="Type here..."></textarea>
+
+            <div class="compose-actions">
+              <button class="send-btn" id="sendBtn" type="submit" disabled>
+                <img class="plane" src="../assets/bb543680-485a-4fa9-b5ed-481596dd53fd.svg" alt="" />
+                Send
+              </button>
+            </div>
+          </form>
+
+          <div class="sent-state" aria-live="polite">
+            <div class="sent-icon" aria-hidden="true"></div>
+            <p class="sent-text">Message Sent!</p>
+          </div>
+        </section>
+      </section>
+    </div>
+  </main>
+
+  <button class="cory-trigger" aria-label="Cory AI" type="button">
+    <img src="../assets/corychaticon.svg" alt="" />
+  </button>
+
+  <div class="cory-popup" id="coryPopup" role="dialog" aria-label="Cory chat" aria-hidden="true">
+    <div class="cory-pointer" aria-hidden="true"></div>
+    <button class="cory-close" type="button" aria-label="Close Cory chat">×</button>
+    <div class="cory-header">
+      <div class="cory-avatar">
+        <img src="../assets/9e494c12-c6a7-45f9-91ac-f474512b6048.svg" alt="" />
+      </div>
+      <p class="cory-name">Cory</p>
+    </div>
+    <div class="cory-body">
+    </div>
+    <div class="cory-input-row">
+      <input class="cory-input" type="text" placeholder="Type a message..." />
+      <button class="cory-send" type="button" aria-label="Send">
+        <img src="../assets/bb543680-485a-4fa9-b5ed-481596dd53fd.svg" alt="" />
+      </button>
+    </div>
+  </div>
+
+  <script>
+    const board = document.querySelector('.board');
+    const newBtn = document.querySelector('.new-btn');
+    const composePanel = document.getElementById('composePanel');
+    const composeClose = document.querySelector('.compose-close');
+    const composeForm = document.getElementById('composeForm');
+    const recipientInput = document.getElementById('recipientInput');
+    const recipientList = document.getElementById('recipientList');
+    const messageInput = document.getElementById('messageInput');
+    const sendBtn = document.getElementById('sendBtn');
+    const messageList = document.querySelector('.list');
+    const coryClose = document.querySelector('.cory-close');
+
+    const recipients = [
+      { name: 'Jessica Flores', role: 'Student', avatar: '../assets/dbc4f08e-3a4f-4cd2-bdae-bcc4e54b3a9f.jpg' },
+      { name: 'Ian Breen', role: 'Student', avatar: '../assets/06a7b4d6-4b69-4062-8523-931943765840.jpg' },
+      { name: 'Emilio Hernandez', role: 'Student', avatar: '../assets/c692489c-6658-467a-b3ad-177f352ef94c.jpg' }
+    ];
+
+    let selectedRecipient = '';
+    let sentTimer = null;
+
+    const listAvatarMap = {
+      'Emmaline Kim': { tone: 'blue', icon: '../assets/6cfa3752-8668-45dd-840a-04566340856c.svg' },
+      'Michael Chen': { tone: 'pink', icon: '../assets/0690951b-a0a0-42be-9f09-ca2e496b3780.svg' },
+      'Aisha Patel': { tone: 'green', icon: '../assets/8a1d99b7-8234-48b5-a3e9-a5a144998c48.svg' },
+      'Ian Breen': { tone: 'blue', icon: '../assets/6cfa3752-8668-45dd-840a-04566340856c.svg' },
+      'Emilio Hernandez': { tone: 'green', icon: '../assets/8a1d99b7-8234-48b5-a3e9-a5a144998c48.svg' }
+    };
+
+    function formatTimestamp(date) {
+      const month = date.getMonth() + 1;
+      const day = date.getDate();
+      const year = String(date.getFullYear()).slice(-2);
+      const hours24 = date.getHours();
+      const hours12 = hours24 % 12 || 12;
+      const minutes = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
+      const suffix = hours24 >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';
+      return `${month}/${day}/${year}, ${hours12}:${minutes} ${suffix}`;
+    }
+
+    function buildMessageRow(name, previewText, timestampText) {
+      const avatar = listAvatarMap[name] || { tone: 'blue', icon: '../assets/6cfa3752-8668-45dd-840a-04566340856c.svg' };
+      const row = document.createElement('div');
+      row.className = 'row';
+      row.innerHTML = `
+        <div class="contact">
+          <div class="avatar ${avatar.tone}"><img src="${avatar.icon}" alt="" /></div>
+          <p class="name">${name}</p>
+        </div>
+        <p class="date">${timestampText}</p>
+        <p class="preview">${previewText}</p>
+      `;
+      return row;
+    }
+
+    function upsertMessageRow(name, previewText) {
+      const timestampText = formatTimestamp(new Date());
+      const rows = [...messageList.querySelectorAll('.row')];
+      const existingRow = rows.find((row) => {
+        const rowName = row.querySelector('.name');
+        return rowName && rowName.textContent.trim() === name;
+      });
+
+      if (existingRow) {
+        existingRow.querySelector('.date').textContent = timestampText;
+        existingRow.querySelector('.preview').textContent = previewText;
+        messageList.prepend(existingRow);
+        return;
+      }
+
+      messageList.prepend(buildMessageRow(name, previewText, timestampText));
+    }
+
+    function updateSendEnabled() {
+      const recipientName = recipientInput.value.trim();
+      const canSend = recipientName.length > 0 && messageInput.value.trim().length > 0;
+      sendBtn.disabled = !canSend;
+    }
+
+    function openCompose() {
+      board.classList.add('is-compose');
+      newBtn.hidden = true;
+      composePanel.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
+      composePanel.classList.remove('is-sent');
+    }
+
+    function closeCompose() {
+      board.classList.remove('is-compose');
+      newBtn.hidden = false;
+      composePanel.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
+      composePanel.classList.remove('is-sent');
+      recipientList.classList.remove('show');
+      selectedRecipient = '';
+      recipientInput.value = '';
+      messageInput.value = '';
+      updateSendEnabled();
+      if (sentTimer) {
+        clearTimeout(sentTimer);
+        sentTimer = null;
+      }
+    }
+
+    function renderRecipientList(filterText = '') {
+      const query = filterText.trim().toLowerCase();
+      const filtered = recipients.filter((person) => person.name.toLowerCase().includes(query));
+      recipientList.innerHTML = filtered.map((person) => `
+        <button class="recipient-option" type="button" data-name="${person.name}">
+          <img class="recipient-avatar" src="${person.avatar}" alt="${person.name}" />
+          <span class="recipient-name">${person.name}</span>
+          <span class="recipient-role">${person.role}</span>
+        </button>
+      `).join('');
+      recipientList.classList.toggle('show', filtered.length > 0);
+    }
+
+    newBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
+      openCompose();
+    });
+
+    composeClose.addEventListener('click', closeCompose);
+
+    recipientInput.addEventListener('focus', () => {
+      renderRecipientList(recipientInput.value);
+    });
+
+    recipientInput.addEventListener('input', () => {
+      selectedRecipient = '';
+      updateSendEnabled();
+      renderRecipientList(recipientInput.value);
+    });
+
+    recipientList.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
+      const option = event.target.closest('.recipient-option');
+      if (!option) {
+        return;
+      }
+      selectedRecipient = option.dataset.name;
+      recipientInput.value = selectedRecipient;
+      recipientList.classList.remove('show');
+      messageInput.focus();
+      updateSendEnabled();
+    });
+
+    messageInput.addEventListener('input', updateSendEnabled);
+
+    composeForm.addEventListener('submit', (event) => {
+      event.preventDefault();
+      if (sendBtn.disabled) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const recipientName = recipientInput.value.trim();
+      const messageText = messageInput.value.trim();
+      upsertMessageRow(recipientName, messageText);
+
+      composePanel.classList.add('is-sent');
+      recipientList.classList.remove('show');
+
+      sentTimer = setTimeout(() => {
+        closeCompose();
+      }, 2500);
+    });
+
+    document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
+      if (!composePanel.contains(event.target) && event.target !== newBtn) {
+        recipientList.classList.remove('show');
+      }
+    });
+
+    const coryToggle = document.querySelector('.cory-trigger');
+    const coryPopup = document.getElementById('coryPopup');
+    const coryBody = document.querySelector('.cory-body');
+    const coryInput = document.querySelector('.cory-input');
+    const corySend = document.querySelector('.cory-send');
+    const isTeacherView = window.location.pathname.includes('/Teacher/');
+
+    function scrollCoryToLatest() {
+      if (coryBody) {
+        coryBody.scrollTop = coryBody.scrollHeight;
+      }
+    }
+
+    function appendCoryBubble(message, role = 'bot', isTyping = false) {
+      if (!coryBody) {
+        return null;
+      }
+
+      const bubble = document.createElement('div');
+      bubble.className = `cory-bubble${role === 'user' ? ' user' : ''}${isTyping ? ' typing' : ''}`;
+
+      const text = document.createElement('p');
+      text.textContent = message;
+      bubble.appendChild(text);
+
+      coryBody.appendChild(bubble);
+      scrollCoryToLatest();
+      return bubble;
+    }
+
+    function getCoryReply(userMessage) {
+      const message = userMessage.toLowerCase();
+
+      if (/(hi|hello|hey)/.test(message)) {
+        return 'Hey! I am Cory. Ask me about coral health, tank care, or where to find tools in this app.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('ph')) {
+        return 'For most reef tanks, pH is healthiest around 8.1 to 8.4. Big swings are more stressful than small day-to-day changes.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('temperature') || message.includes('temp')) {
+        return 'Coral systems usually do best around 76 to 80 degrees F. Keep temperature steady and avoid fast spikes.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('salinity')) {
+        return 'Target salinity near 35 ppt. Stability matters the most, so adjust slowly if you need to correct it.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('redox') || message.includes('orp')) {
+        return 'Redox (ORP) helps show overall water chemistry stability. Use it as a trend indicator, not a single-pass/fail number.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('health') || message.includes('tank')) {
+        return 'A healthy tank usually means stable pH, temperature, salinity, and consistent maintenance. Small regular habits beat big corrections.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('clean') || message.includes('maintenance')) {
+        return 'Try a routine: check vitals daily, clean glass as needed, and schedule water changes on a fixed cadence.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('calendar')) {
+        return 'Use the Calendar to switch between Month and Day views, then click a date in Day view to jump directly to that day.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('message') || message.includes('chat')) {
+        return 'You can use Messages to communicate with your class team. I can also help summarize what to ask or post.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('course') || message.includes('learn') || message.includes('assignment')) {
+        return isTeacherView
+          ? 'In Teacher view, open Courses to manage lessons and due dates. Use Post Reading for reading prompts and follow-up tasks.'
+          : 'In Student view, open Learn to check assignments and due dates, then track progress from your dashboard.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('profile')) {
+        return 'Open Profile to review your account and class details. You can update info from the edit control there.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('help') || message.includes('what can you do')) {
+        return 'I can answer coral-care basics, explain tank metrics, and help you navigate pages like Calendar, Learn/Courses, Messages, and Profile.';
+      }
+
+      return 'I can help with coral care or app navigation. Try asking about pH, salinity, temperature, Calendar, Messages, or Learn/Courses.';
+    }
+
+    function handleCorySend() {
+      if (!coryInput) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const userMessage = coryInput.value.trim();
+      if (!userMessage) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      appendCoryBubble(userMessage, 'user');
+      coryInput.value = '';
+
+      const typingBubble = appendCoryBubble('Thinking...', 'bot', true);
+      window.setTimeout(() => {
+        if (typingBubble) {
+          typingBubble.remove();
+        }
+        appendCoryBubble(getCoryReply(userMessage), 'bot');
+      }, 350);
+    }
+
+    function setPopupOpen(open) {
+      coryPopup.setAttribute('aria-hidden', open ? 'false' : 'true');
+      if (open && coryInput) {
+        coryInput.focus();
+      }
+    }
+
+    coryToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
+      const isOpen = coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'false';
+      setPopupOpen(!isOpen);
+    });
+
+    coryClose.addEventListener('click', () => {
+      setPopupOpen(false);
+    });
+
+    document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
+      if (coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'true') {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      if (!coryPopup.contains(event.target) && !coryToggle.contains(event.target)) {
+        setPopupOpen(false);
+      }
+    });
+
+    document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+      if (event.key === 'Escape') {
+        setPopupOpen(false);
+      }
+    });
+
+    if (corySend && coryInput && coryBody) {
+      corySend.addEventListener('click', handleCorySend);
+      coryInput.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+        if (event.key === 'Enter') {
+          event.preventDefault();
+          handleCorySend();
+        }
+      });
+    }
+  </script>
+</body>

+  <div class="cory-popup" id="coryPopup" role="dialog" aria-label="Cory chat" aria-hidden="true">
+    <div class="cory-pointer" aria-hidden="true"></div>
+    <button class="cory-close" type="button" aria-label="Close Cory chat">×</button>
+    <div class="cory-header">
+      <div class="cory-avatar">
+        <img src="../assets/9e494c12-c6a7-45f9-91ac-f474512b6048.svg" alt="" />
+      </div>
+      <p class="cory-name">Cory</p>
+    </div>
+    <div class="cory-body">
+    </div>
+    <div class="cory-input-row">
+      <input class="cory-input" type="text" placeholder="Type a message..." />
+      <button class="cory-send" type="button" aria-label="Send">
+        <img src="../assets/bb543680-485a-4fa9-b5ed-481596dd53fd.svg" alt="" />
+      </button>
+    </div>
+  </div>
