+  <script>
+    function attachCoryChat() {
+      const coryToggle = document.querySelector('.cory-trigger');
+      const coryPopup = document.getElementById('coryPopup');
+      if (!coryToggle || !coryPopup) return;
+      const coryBody = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-body');
+      const coryInput = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-input');
+      const corySend = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-send');
+      const coryClose = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-close');
+      const scrollCoryToLatest = () => { if (coryBody) coryBody.scrollTop = coryBody.scrollHeight; };
+      const appendCoryBubble = (message, role = 'bot', isTyping = false) => {
+        if (!coryBody) return null;
+        const bubble = document.createElement('div');
+        bubble.className = `cory-bubble${role === 'user' ? ' user' : ''}${isTyping ? ' typing' : ''}`;
+        const text = document.createElement('p');
+        text.textContent = message;
+        bubble.appendChild(text);
+        coryBody.appendChild(bubble);
+        scrollCoryToLatest();
+        return bubble;
+      };
+      const isTeacherView = window.location.pathname.includes('/Teacher/');
+      const getCoryReply = (userMessage) => {
+        const message = userMessage.toLowerCase();
+        if (/(hi|hello|hey)/.test(message)) return 'Hey! I am Cory. Ask me about coral health, tank care, or where to find tools in this app.';
+        if (message.includes('ph')) return 'For most reef tanks, pH is healthiest around 8.1 to 8.4. Big swings are more stressful than small day-to-day changes.';
+        if (message.includes('temperature') || message.includes('temp')) return 'Coral systems usually do best around 76 to 80 degrees F. Keep temperature steady and avoid fast spikes.';
+        if (message.includes('salinity')) return 'Target salinity near 35 ppt. Stability matters the most, so adjust slowly if you need to correct it.';
+        if (message.includes('redox') || message.includes('orp')) return 'Redox (ORP) helps show overall water chemistry stability. Use it as a trend indicator, not a single-pass/fail number.';
+        if (message.includes('health') || message.includes('tank')) return 'A healthy tank usually means stable pH, temperature, salinity, and consistent maintenance. Small regular habits beat big corrections.';
+        if (message.includes('clean') || message.includes('maintenance')) return 'Try a routine: check vitals daily, clean glass as needed, and schedule water changes on a fixed cadence.';
+        if (message.includes('calendar')) return 'Use the Calendar to switch between Month and Day views, then click a date in Day view to jump directly to that day.';
+        if (message.includes('message') || message.includes('chat')) return 'You can use Messages to communicate with your class team. I can also help summarize what to ask or post.';
+        if (message.includes('course') || message.includes('learn') || message.includes('assignment')) return isTeacherView ? 'In Teacher view, open Courses to manage lessons and due dates. Use Post Reading for reading prompts and follow-up tasks.' : 'In Student view, open Learn to check assignments and due dates, then track progress from your dashboard.';
+        if (message.includes('profile')) return 'Open Profile to review your account and class details. You can update info from the edit control there.';
+        if (message.includes('help') || message.includes('what can you do')) return 'I can answer coral-care basics, explain tank metrics, and help you navigate pages like Calendar, Learn/Courses, Messages, and Profile.';
+        return 'I can help with coral care or app navigation. Try asking about pH, salinity, temperature, Calendar, Messages, or Learn/Courses.';
+      };
+      const handleCorySend = () => {
+        if (!coryInput) return;
+        const userMessage = coryInput.value.trim();
+        if (!userMessage) return;
+        appendCoryBubble(userMessage, 'user');
+        coryInput.value = '';
+        const typingBubble = appendCoryBubble('Thinking...', 'bot', true);
+        window.setTimeout(() => {
+          if (typingBubble) typingBubble.remove();
+          appendCoryBubble(getCoryReply(userMessage), 'bot');
+        }, 350);
+      };
+      const setPopupOpen = (open) => {
+        coryPopup.setAttribute('aria-hidden', open ? 'false' : 'true');
+        if (open && coryInput) coryInput.focus();
+      };
+      coryToggle.addEventListener('click', () => { const isOpen = coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'false'; setPopupOpen(!isOpen); });
+
+      coryClose.addEventListener('click', () => {
+        setPopupOpen(false);
+      });
+
+      document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
+        if (coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'true') return;
+        if (!coryPopup.contains(event.target) && !coryToggle.contains(event.target)) setPopupOpen(false);
+      });
+      document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => { if (event.key === 'Escape') setPopupOpen(false); });
+      if (corySend && coryInput && coryBody) {
+        corySend.addEventListener('click', handleCorySend);
+        coryInput.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+          if (event.key === 'Enter') { event.preventDefault(); handleCorySend(); }
+        });
+      }
+    }
+
+    attachCoryChat();
+  </script>
+  <script>
+    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
+      const leaderboard = document.querySelector('.leaderboard');
+      const items = document.querySelectorAll('.leaderboard-item');
+      
+      if (!leaderboard) return;
+
+      function updateOpacities() {
+        const containerRect = leaderboard.getBoundingClientRect();
+        const H = containerRect.height;
+        
+        let targetY = 30 + leaderboard.scrollTop;
+        if (targetY > H / 2) {
+          targetY = H / 2;
+        }
+        
+        items.forEach(item => {
+          const rect = item.getBoundingClientRect();
+          const itemY = rect.top + rect.height / 2 - containerRect.top;
+          
+          const dist = Math.abs(itemY - targetY);
+          
+          let opacity = 1 - (dist / (H / 1.5));
+          opacity = Math.max(0.15, Math.min(1, opacity));
+          
+          item.style.opacity = opacity;
+        });
+      }
+
+      leaderboard.addEventListener('scroll', updateOpacities);
+      window.addEventListener('resize', updateOpacities);
+      updateOpacities();
+    });
+  </script>
+</body>
+</html>

+# Uniform Metric Update Logic (Website Standard)
+
+This file documents the exact live metric-change logic used by the website for:
+- Health Score
+- Temperature
+- pH
+- Salinity
+- Redox
+
+Use this in the app so behavior is 1:1 with the web version.
+
+Source of truth:
+- Teacher home: Teacher/index.html
+- Student home: Student/index.html
+
+Both pages use the same engine.
+
+---
+
+## 1. Initial Metric Values
+
+Initialize metrics with:
+
+- health = 94
+- temp = 78.2
+- ph = 8.4
+- salinity = 35
+- redox = 380
+
+---
+
+## 2. Hard Bounds (Clamp Limits)
+
+Clamp each metric after every update:
+
+- health: min 70, max 100
+- temp: min 72, max 84
+- ph: min 7.8, max 8.8
+- salinity: min 30, max 40
+- redox: min 300, max 450
+
+Clamp formula:
+
+value = min(maxValue, max(minValue, value))
+
+---
+
+## 3. Per-Tick Change Model
+
+Each tick uses percentage jitter:
+
+- pct = random in [-2, +2]
+- newValue = oldValue * (1 + pct / 100)
+
+Exact behavior:
+
+- health: jittered and clamped
+- temp: jittered and clamped
+- ph: jittered and clamped
+- salinity: jittered and clamped
+- redox: jittered and clamped
+
+Important: this is multiplicative percent change, not additive.
+
+---
+
+## 4. Update Timing
+
+The engine does not use a fixed interval.
+
+It schedules the next tick with:
+
+- delayMs = 6000 + random(0..1000)
+
+So each update occurs every 6.0s to 7.0s.
+
+Flow:
+
+1. Render initial values (with zero deltas)
+2. Wait 6000-7000 ms
+3. Run tick (update metrics, render)
+4. Schedule next tick again at 6000-7000 ms
+
+---
+
+## 5. Display Formatting Rules
+
+Rendered values:
+
+- Health main: round(health) + "%"
+- Temperature main: temp.toFixed(1) + "°F"
+- pH main: ph.toFixed(2)
+- Salinity main: round(salinity) + " ppt"
+- Redox main: round(redox) + " mV"
+
+Trend/delta display:
+
+- Health delta text: abs(healthPct).toFixed(1) + "%"
+- Temp delta text: abs(tempPct).toFixed(1) + "°"
+- Salinity delta text: abs(salinityPct).toFixed(1) + " ppt"
+
+Arrow logic (for health/temp/salinity):
+
+- up arrow "↑" if changePct > 0.05
+- down arrow "↓" if changePct < -0.05
+- flat arrow "→" otherwise
+
+Note: arrow threshold is +/-0.05 percent, not +/-0.5.
+
+---
+
+## 6. Reference Pseudocode
+
+const metrics = {
+  health: 94,
+  temp: 78.2,
+  ph: 8.4,
+  salinity: 35,
+  redox: 380
+};
+
+const bounds = {
+  health: [70, 100],
+  temp: [72, 84],
+  ph: [7.8, 8.8],
+  salinity: [30, 40],
+  redox: [300, 450]
+};
+
+function clamp(v, min, max) {
+  return Math.min(max, Math.max(min, v));
+}
+
+function jitterByPercent(value) {
+  const pct = (Math.random() * 4) - 2;
+  return { value: value * (1 + pct / 100), pct };
+}
+
+function tick() {
+  const healthUpdate = jitterByPercent(metrics.health);
+  metrics.health = clamp(healthUpdate.value, 70, 100);
+
+  const tempUpdate = jitterByPercent(metrics.temp);
+  metrics.temp = clamp(tempUpdate.value, 72, 84);
+
+  metrics.ph = clamp(jitterByPercent(metrics.ph).value, 7.8, 8.8);
+
+  const salinityUpdate = jitterByPercent(metrics.salinity);
+  metrics.salinity = clamp(salinityUpdate.value, 30, 40);
+
+  metrics.redox = clamp(jitterByPercent(metrics.redox).value, 300, 450);
+
+  render({
+    health: healthUpdate.pct,
+    temp: tempUpdate.pct,
+    salinity: salinityUpdate.pct
+  });
+
+  setTimeout(tick, 6000 + (Math.random() * 1000));
+}
+
+render({ health: 0, temp: 0, salinity: 0 });
+setTimeout(tick, 6000 + (Math.random() * 1000));
+
+---
+
+## 7. Uniformity Requirement
+
+For app parity, keep these exactly the same:
+
+- Initial metric values
+- Jitter range (-2% to +2%)
+- Clamp bounds
+- Tick cadence (6s to 7s randomized)
+- Arrow threshold (+/-0.05)
+- Number formatting/rounding shown above
+
+If any of these differ, users will notice a mismatch between app and website.

--- /Users/carsonohara/Downloads/Coral-Keepers-Teacher_New/Coral-Keepers-Teacher_New/Teacher/announcements.html	1969-12-31 17:00:00

+              <path d="M1000,300c-186.3,0 -342.889,127.503 -387.305,300l-312.695,0c-55.2,0 -100,44.8 -100,100c0,55.2 44.8,100 100,100l312.695,0c44.416,172.497 201.005,300 387.305,300c186.3,0 342.889,-127.503 387.305,-300l1512.69,0c55.2,0 100,-44.8 100,-100c0,-55.2 -44.8,-100 -100,-100l-1512.69,0c-44.416,-172.497 -201.005,-300 -387.305,-300Zm0,200c110.4,0 200,89.6 200,200c0,110.4 -89.6,200 -200,200c-110.4,0 -200,-89.6 -200,-200c0,-110.4 89.6,-200 200,-200Zm1200,700c-186.3,0 -342.889,127.503 -387.305,300l-1512.69,0c-55.2,0 -100,44.8 -100,100c0,55.2 44.8,100 100,100l1512.69,0c44.416,172.497 201.005,300 387.305,300c186.3,0 342.889,-127.503 387.305,-300l312.695,0c55.2,0 100,-44.8 100,-100c0,-55.2 -44.8,-100 -100,-100l-312.695,0c-44.416,-172.497 -201.005,-300 -387.305,-300Zm0,200c110.4,0 200,89.6 200,200c0,110.4 -89.6,200 -200,200c-110.4,0 -200,-89.6 -200,-200c0,-110.4 89.6,-200 200,-200Zm-1200,700c-186.3,0 -342.889,127.503 -387.305,300l-312.695,0c-55.2,0 -100,44.8 -100,100c0,55.2 44.8,100 100,100l312.695,0c44.416,172.497 201.005,300 387.305,300c186.3,0 342.889,-127.503 387.305,-300l1512.69,0c55.2,0 100,-44.8 100,-100c0,-55.2 -44.8,-100 -100,-100l-1512.69,0c-44.416,-172.497 -201.005,-300 -387.305,-300Zm0,200c110.4,0 200,89.6 200,200c0,110.4 -89.6,200 -200,200c-110.4,0 -200,-89.6 -200,-200c0,-110.4 89.6,-200 200,-200Z" />
+            </svg>
+          </button>

+              <path d="M7 1.5V12.5M1.5 7H12.5" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
+            </svg>

+  <div class="compose-backdrop" id="composeBackdrop" aria-hidden="true">
+    <div class="compose-modal" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="composeTitle">
+      <div class="compose-head">
+        <h2 class="compose-title" id="composeTitle">New Announcement</h2>
+        <button class="compose-close" id="closeComposer" type="button" aria-label="Close composer">×</button>
+      </div>
+      <form class="compose-body" id="announcementForm">
+        <div>
+          <label class="field-label" for="announcementTitle">Title</label>
+          <input class="input" id="announcementTitle" name="title" type="text" maxlength="80" required placeholder="Enter announcement title" />
+        </div>
+
+        <div>
+          <label class="field-label" for="announcementBody">Announcement</label>
+          <textarea class="textarea" id="announcementBody" name="body" maxlength="280" required placeholder="Type your announcement message"></textarea>
+        </div>
+
+        <div class="compose-grid">
+          <div>
+            <label class="field-label" for="announcementDate">Date</label>
+            <input class="input" id="announcementDate" name="date" type="datetime-local" required />
+          </div>
+          <div>
+            <label class="field-label" for="announcementStatus">Status</label>
+            <select class="select" id="announcementStatus" name="status" required>
+              <option value="posted">Posted</option>
+              <option value="scheduled">Scheduled</option>
+              <option value="draft">Draft</option>
+            </select>
+          </div>
+        </div>
+
+        <div class="compose-actions">
+          <button class="btn secondary" id="cancelComposer" type="button">Cancel</button>
+          <button class="btn primary" type="submit">Send</button>
+        </div>
+      </form>
+    </div>
+  </div>
+
+  <button class="floating-ai" aria-label="Cory AI">
+    <img src="../assets/corychaticon.svg" alt="" />
+  </button>
+
+  <div class="cory-popup" id="coryPopup" role="dialog" aria-label="Cory chat" aria-hidden="true">
+    <div class="cory-pointer" aria-hidden="true"></div>
+    <button class="cory-close" type="button" aria-label="Close Cory chat">×</button>
+    <div class="cory-header">
+      <div class="cory-avatar">
+        <img src="../assets/9e494c12-c6a7-45f9-91ac-f474512b6048.svg" alt="" />
+      </div>
+      <p class="cory-name">Cory</p>
+    </div>
+    <div class="cory-body">
+    </div>
+    <div class="cory-input-row">
+      <input class="cory-input" type="text" placeholder="Type a message..." />
+      <button class="cory-send" type="button" aria-label="Send">
+        <img src="../assets/bb543680-485a-4fa9-b5ed-481596dd53fd.svg" alt="" />
+      </button>
+    </div>
+  </div>
+
+  <script>
+    function attachCoryChat() {
+      const coryToggle = document.querySelector('.floating-ai, .cory-trigger');
+      const coryPopup = document.getElementById('coryPopup');
+      if (!coryToggle || !coryPopup) return;
+
+      const coryBody = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-body');
+      const coryInput = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-input');
+      const corySend = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-send');
+      const coryClose = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-close');
+      const isTeacherView = window.location.pathname.includes('/Teacher/');
+
+      const scrollCoryToLatest = () => { if (coryBody) coryBody.scrollTop = coryBody.scrollHeight; };
+      const appendCoryBubble = (message, role = 'bot', isTyping = false) => {
+        if (!coryBody) return null;
+        const bubble = document.createElement('div');
+        bubble.className = `cory-bubble${role === 'user' ? ' user' : ''}${isTyping ? ' typing' : ''}`;
+        const text = document.createElement('p');
+        text.textContent = message;
+        bubble.appendChild(text);
+        coryBody.appendChild(bubble);
+        scrollCoryToLatest();
+        return bubble;
+      };
+      const getCoryReply = (userMessage) => {
+        const message = userMessage.toLowerCase();
+        if (/(hi|hello|hey)/.test(message)) return 'Hey! I am Cory. Ask me about coral health, tank care, or where to find tools in this app.';
+        if (message.includes('ph')) return 'For most reef tanks, pH is healthiest around 8.1 to 8.4. Big swings are more stressful than small day-to-day changes.';
+        if (message.includes('temperature') || message.includes('temp')) return 'Coral systems usually do best around 76 to 80 degrees F. Keep temperature steady and avoid fast spikes.';
+        if (message.includes('salinity')) return 'Target salinity near 35 ppt. Stability matters the most, so adjust slowly if you need to correct it.';
+        if (message.includes('announcement')) return 'Announcements are best when they are short, specific, and tied to a due date or classroom action.';
+        if (message.includes('calendar')) return 'Use the Calendar to switch between Month and Day views, then click a date in Day view to jump directly to that day.';
+        if (message.includes('course') || message.includes('learn') || message.includes('assignment')) return isTeacherView ? 'In Teacher view, open Courses to manage lessons and due dates. Use Post Reading for reading prompts and follow-up tasks.' : 'In Student view, open Learn to check assignments and due dates, then track progress from your dashboard.';
+        return 'I can help with coral care or app navigation. Try asking about pH, salinity, temperature, Calendar, Messages, or Learn/Courses.';
+      };
+      const handleCorySend = () => {
+        if (!coryInput) return;
+        const userMessage = coryInput.value.trim();
+        if (!userMessage) return;
+        appendCoryBubble(userMessage, 'user');
+        coryInput.value = '';
+        const typingBubble = appendCoryBubble('Thinking...', 'bot', true);
+        window.setTimeout(() => {
+          if (typingBubble) typingBubble.remove();
+          appendCoryBubble(getCoryReply(userMessage), 'bot');
+        }, 350);
+      };
+      const setPopupOpen = (open) => {
+        coryPopup.setAttribute('aria-hidden', open ? 'false' : 'true');
+        if (open && coryInput) coryInput.focus();
+      };
+      coryToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
+        const isOpen = coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'false';
+        setPopupOpen(!isOpen);
+      });
+      coryClose.addEventListener('click', () => {
+        setPopupOpen(false);
+      });
+      document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
+        if (coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'true') return;
+        if (!coryPopup.contains(event.target) && !coryToggle.contains(event.target)) setPopupOpen(false);
+      });
+      document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => { if (event.key === 'Escape') setPopupOpen(false); });
+      if (corySend && coryInput && coryBody) {
+        corySend.addEventListener('click', handleCorySend);
+        coryInput.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+          if (event.key === 'Enter') {
+            event.preventDefault();
+            handleCorySend();
+          }
+        });
+      }
+    }
+
+    const openComposer = document.getElementById("openComposer");
+    const closeComposer = document.getElementById("closeComposer");
+    const cancelComposer = document.getElementById("cancelComposer");
+    const composeBackdrop = document.getElementById("composeBackdrop");
+    const announcementForm = document.getElementById("announcementForm");
+    const announcementList = document.getElementById("announcementList");
+    const postedCount = document.getElementById("postedCount");
+    const scheduledCount = document.getElementById("scheduledCount");
+    const draftCount = document.getElementById("draftCount");
+
+    function setComposerOpen(open) {
+      composeBackdrop.setAttribute("aria-hidden", open ? "false" : "true");
+      document.body.style.overflow = open ? "hidden" : "";
+      if (open) {
+        document.getElementById("announcementTitle").focus();
+      }
+    }
+
+    function formatDateTime(value) {
+      const parsed = new Date(value);
+      if (Number.isNaN(parsed.getTime())) {
+        return "--";
+      }
+      return parsed.toLocaleString("en-US", {
+        month: "numeric",
+        day: "numeric",
+        year: "numeric",
+        hour: "numeric",
+        minute: "2-digit",
+      });
+    }
+
+    function incrementCount(counterEl) {
+      const current = Number(counterEl.textContent || "0");
+      counterEl.textContent = String(current + 1);
+    }
+
+    function buildStatusIcon(status) {
+      if (status === "draft") {
+        const pencil = document.createElement("img");
+        pencil.className = "pencil";
+        pencil.src = "../assets/teacher-ann-draft-pencil.svg";
+        pencil.alt = "";
+        pencil.style.width = "18px";
+        pencil.style.height = "18px";
+        return pencil;
+      }
+
+      const wrap = document.createElement("span");
+      wrap.className = "status-icon";
+      wrap.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
+
+      const outline = document.createElement("img");
+      outline.className = "outline";
+      outline.src = "../assets/teacher-ann-circle-outline.svg";
+      outline.alt = "";
+      wrap.appendChild(outline);
+
+      if (status === "posted") {
+        wrap.classList.add("posted");
+        const fill = document.createElement("img");
+        fill.className = "fill";
+        fill.src = "../assets/teacher-ann-circle-fill.svg";
+        fill.alt = "";
+        wrap.appendChild(fill);
+      }
+
+      if (status === "scheduled") {
+        const hand = document.createElement("img");
+        hand.className = "hand";
+        hand.src = "../assets/teacher-ann-clock-hand-b.svg";
+        hand.alt = "";
+        wrap.appendChild(hand);
+      }
+
+      return wrap;
+    }
+
+    function updateSummaryCounts() {
+      const rows = announcementList.querySelectorAll('.announcement-row');
+      let posted = 0;
+      let scheduled = 0;
+      let drafts = 0;
+
+      rows.forEach(row => {
+        const label = row.querySelector('.status-label').textContent.toLowerCase();
+        if (label === 'posted') posted++;
+        else if (label === 'scheduled') scheduled++;
+        else if (label === 'draft') drafts++;
+      });
+
+      postedCount.textContent = posted;
+      scheduledCount.textContent = scheduled;
+      draftCount.textContent = drafts;
+    }
+
+    function addAnnouncementRow({ title, body, date, status }) {
+      const row = document.createElement("div");
+      row.className = "announcement-row";
+
+      const iconContainer = document.createElement("div");
+      iconContainer.style.width = "19px";
+      iconContainer.style.display = "flex";
+      iconContainer.style.justifyContent = "center";
+      iconContainer.appendChild(buildStatusIcon(status));
+      row.appendChild(iconContainer);
+
+      const contentCol = document.createElement("div");
+      const titleEl = document.createElement("p");
+      titleEl.className = "row-title";
+      titleEl.textContent = title;
+      const bodyEl = document.createElement("p");
+      bodyEl.className = "row-copy";
+      bodyEl.textContent = body;
+      contentCol.appendChild(titleEl);
+      contentCol.appendChild(bodyEl);
+      row.appendChild(contentCol);
+
+      const statusCol = document.createElement("div");
+      statusCol.className = "status-col";
+      const statusLabel = document.createElement("span");
+      statusLabel.className = "status-label";
+      statusLabel.textContent = status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + status.slice(1);
+      const statusDate = document.createElement("span");
+      statusDate.className = "status-date";
+      statusDate.textContent = formatDateTime(date);
+      statusCol.appendChild(statusLabel);
+      statusCol.appendChild(statusDate);
+      row.appendChild(statusCol);
+
+      const viewerCol = document.createElement("div");
+      viewerCol.className = "viewer-col";
+      if (status === "draft") {
+        viewerCol.textContent = "0/24";
+      } else {
+        const count = Math.floor(Math.random() * 8) + 17; // Random between 17 and 24
+        viewerCol.textContent = `${count}/24`;
+      }
+      row.appendChild(viewerCol);
+
+      const editCol = document.createElement("div");
+      editCol.className = "edit-col";
+      const editLink = document.createElement("a");
+      editLink.href = "#";
+      editLink.textContent = "Edit";
+      editCol.appendChild(editLink);
+      row.appendChild(editCol);
+
+      announcementList.prepend(row);
+      updateSummaryCounts();
+    }
+
+    announcementList.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
+      if (event.target.tagName === "A" && event.target.textContent === "Edit") {
+        event.preventDefault();
+        const row = event.target.closest(".announcement-row");
+        const title = row.querySelector(".row-title").textContent;
+        const body = row.querySelector(".row-copy").textContent;
+        const status = row.querySelector(".status-label").textContent.toLowerCase();
+        
+        document.getElementById("announcementTitle").value = title;
+        document.getElementById("announcementBody").value = body;
+        document.getElementById("announcementStatus").value = status;
+        
+        if (status === 'draft') {
+          const now = new Date();
+          now.setMinutes(now.getMinutes() - now.getTimezoneOffset());
+          document.getElementById("announcementDate").value = now.toISOString().slice(0, 16);
+        } else {
+          const dateStr = row.querySelector(".status-date").textContent;
+          const parsedDate = new Date(dateStr);
+          if (!isNaN(parsedDate)) {
+            parsedDate.setMinutes(parsedDate.getMinutes() - parsedDate.getTimezoneOffset());
+            document.getElementById("announcementDate").value = parsedDate.toISOString().slice(0, 16);
+          } else {
+            const now = new Date();
+            now.setMinutes(now.getMinutes() - now.getTimezoneOffset());
+            document.getElementById("announcementDate").value = now.toISOString().slice(0, 16);
+          }
+        }
+        
+        setComposerOpen(true);
+        // Note: For a real app, we'd swap "Add" for "Update" logic, 
+        // but here we'll just let them add it as a new one or they can manually delete the old one.
+      }
+    });
+
+    openComposer.addEventListener("click", () => {
+      announcementForm.reset();
+      setComposerOpen(true);
+    });
+
+    closeComposer.addEventListener("click", () => setComposerOpen(false));
+    cancelComposer.addEventListener("click", () => setComposerOpen(false));
+
+    composeBackdrop.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
+      if (event.target === composeBackdrop) {
+        setComposerOpen(false);
+      }
+    });
+
+    document.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
+      if (event.key === "Escape" && composeBackdrop.getAttribute("aria-hidden") === "false") {
+        setComposerOpen(false);
+      }
+    });
+
+    announcementForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
+      event.preventDefault();
+      const formData = new FormData(announcementForm);
+
+      addAnnouncementRow({
+        title: String(formData.get("title") || "").trim(),
+        body: String(formData.get("body") || "").trim(),
+        date: String(formData.get("date") || ""),
+        status: String(formData.get("status") || "posted").toLowerCase(),
+      });
+
+      announcementForm.reset();
+      setComposerOpen(false);
+    });
+
+    // Initialize randomized viewer counts for existing rows
+    document.querySelectorAll('.announcement-row').forEach(row => {
+      const viewerCol = row.querySelector('.viewer-col');
+      const statusLabel = row.querySelector('.status-label').textContent.toLowerCase();
+      if (statusLabel !== 'draft' && viewerCol.textContent === '20/24') {
+        const count = Math.floor(Math.random() * 8) + 17;
+        viewerCol.textContent = `${count}/24`;
+      }
+    });
+
+    const searchInput = document.querySelector('.search-input');
+    if (searchInput) {
+      searchInput.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
+        const query = e.target.value.toLowerCase();
+        const rows = document.querySelectorAll('.announcement-row');
+        rows.forEach(row => {
+          const title = row.querySelector('.row-title').textContent.toLowerCase();
+          const copy = row.querySelector('.row-copy').textContent.toLowerCase();
+          if (title.includes(query) || copy.includes(query)) {
+            row.style.display = 'grid';
+          } else {
+            row.style.display = 'none';
+          }
+        });
+      });
+    }
+
+    updateSummaryCounts();
+    attachCoryChat();
+  </script>
+</body>
+</html>

+        right: -40px;
+      }
+    }

+  <button class="cory-trigger" aria-label="Cory AI" type="button">
+    <img src="../assets/corychaticon.svg" alt="" />
+  </button>
+
+  <div class="cory-popup" id="coryPopup" role="dialog" aria-label="Cory chat" aria-hidden="true">
+    <div class="cory-pointer" aria-hidden="true"></div>
+    <button class="cory-close" type="button" aria-label="Close Cory chat">×</button>
+    <div class="cory-header">
+      <div class="cory-avatar">
+        <img src="../assets/9e494c12-c6a7-45f9-91ac-f474512b6048.svg" alt="" />
+      </div>
+      <p class="cory-name">Cory</p>
+    </div>
+    <div class="cory-body">
+    </div>
+    <div class="cory-input-row">
+      <input class="cory-input" type="text" placeholder="Type a message..." />
+      <button class="cory-send" type="button" aria-label="Send">
+        <img src="../assets/bb543680-485a-4fa9-b5ed-481596dd53fd.svg" alt="" />
+      </button>
+    </div>
+  </div>
+
+  <script>
+    function attachCoryChat() {
+      const coryToggle = document.querySelector('.cory-trigger');
+      const coryPopup = document.getElementById('coryPopup');
+      if (!coryToggle || !coryPopup) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const coryBody = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-body');
+      const coryInput = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-input');
+      const corySend = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-send');
+      const coryClose = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-close');
+      const isTeacherView = window.location.pathname.includes('/Teacher/');
+
+      function scrollCoryToLatest() {
+        if (coryBody) coryBody.scrollTop = coryBody.scrollHeight;
+      }
+
+      function appendCoryBubble(message, role = 'bot', isTyping = false) {
+        if (!coryBody) return null;
+        const bubble = document.createElement('div');
+        bubble.className = `cory-bubble${role === 'user' ? ' user' : ''}${isTyping ? ' typing' : ''}`;
+        const text = document.createElement('p');
+        text.textContent = message;
+        bubble.appendChild(text);
+        coryBody.appendChild(bubble);
+        scrollCoryToLatest();
+        return bubble;
+      }
+
+      function getCoryReply(userMessage) {
+        const message = userMessage.toLowerCase();
+        if (/(hi|hello|hey)/.test(message)) return 'Hey! I am Cory. Ask me about coral health, tank care, or where to find tools in this app.';
+        if (message.includes('ph')) return 'For most reef tanks, pH is healthiest around 8.1 to 8.4. Big swings are more stressful than small day-to-day changes.';
+        if (message.includes('temperature') || message.includes('temp')) return 'Coral systems usually do best around 76 to 80 degrees F. Keep temperature steady and avoid fast spikes.';
+        if (message.includes('salinity')) return 'Target salinity near 35 ppt. Stability matters the most, so adjust slowly if you need to correct it.';
+        if (message.includes('calendar')) return 'Use the Calendar to switch between Month and Day views, then click a date in Day view to jump directly to that day.';
+        if (message.includes('course') || message.includes('learn') || message.includes('assignment')) return isTeacherView ? 'In Teacher view, open Courses to manage lessons and due dates. Use Post Reading for reading prompts and follow-up tasks.' : 'In Student view, open Learn to check assignments and due dates, then track progress from your dashboard.';
+        return 'I can help with coral care or app navigation. Try asking about pH, salinity, temperature, Calendar, Messages, or Learn/Courses.';
+      }
+
+      function handleCorySend() {
+        if (!coryInput) return;
+        const userMessage = coryInput.value.trim();
+        if (!userMessage) return;
+        appendCoryBubble(userMessage, 'user');
+        coryInput.value = '';
+        const typingBubble = appendCoryBubble('Thinking...', 'bot', true);
+        window.setTimeout(() => {
+          if (typingBubble) typingBubble.remove();
+          appendCoryBubble(getCoryReply(userMessage), 'bot');
+        }, 350);
+      }
+
+      function setPopupOpen(open) {
+        coryPopup.setAttribute('aria-hidden', open ? 'false' : 'true');
+        if (open && coryInput) coryInput.focus();
+      }
+
+      coryToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
+        const isOpen = coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'false';
+        setPopupOpen(!isOpen);
+      });
+
+      coryClose.addEventListener('click', () => {
+        setPopupOpen(false);
+      });
+
+      document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {        if (coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'true') return;
+        if (!coryPopup.contains(event.target) && !coryToggle.contains(event.target)) setPopupOpen(false);
+      });
+
+      document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+        if (event.key === 'Escape') setPopupOpen(false);
+      });
+
+      if (corySend && coryInput && coryBody) {
+        corySend.addEventListener('click', handleCorySend);
+        coryInput.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+          if (event.key === 'Enter') {
+            event.preventDefault();
+            handleCorySend();
+          }
+        });
+      }
+    }
+
+    const calendarShell = document.querySelector('.calendar-shell');
+    const viewButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.view-toggle button');
+    const monthTitleEl = document.querySelector('.month-title');
+    const dayHeaderTitleEl = document.querySelector('.calendar-header-day-title');
+    const dayTitleEl = document.querySelector('.day-title');
+    const monthGridEl = document.querySelector('.calendar-grid');
+    const dayWeekdaysEl = document.querySelector('.day-weekdays');
+    const dayDatesEl = document.querySelector('.day-dates');
+    const dayViewEl = document.querySelector('.calendar-day-view');
+    const monthPrevBtn = document.querySelector('.month-arrow-left');
+    const monthNextBtn = document.querySelector('.month-nav .month-arrow:not(.month-arrow-left)');
+    const dayPrevBtn = document.querySelector('.day-week-arrow.left');
+    const dayNextBtn = document.querySelector('.day-week-arrow.right');
+    const timelineGridEl = document.querySelector('.timeline-grid');
+
+    const monthNames = ['January', 'February', 'March', 'April', 'May', 'June', 'July', 'August', 'September', 'October', 'November', 'December'];
+    const weekdayLetters = ['S', 'M', 'T', 'W', 'T', 'F', 'S'];
+    let selectedDate = new Date(2026, 3, 4);
+    const monthEventMap = {
+      '2026-04-04': [
+        { type: 'orange', label: 'Reminder:', text: 'It is your turn to clean the coral tank!' }
+      ],
+      '2026-04-06': [
+        { type: 'orange', label: '8:00 AM', text: 'Exploring...' },
+        { type: 'blue', label: '10:00 AM', text: 'Marine Bio...', stackClass: 'stack-2' },
+        { type: 'purple', label: '12:00 PM', text: 'Coral Scien...', stackClass: 'stack-3' }
+      ],
+      '2026-04-07': [
+        { type: 'orange', label: '8:00 AM', text: 'Exploring...' },
+        { type: 'blue', label: '10:00 AM', text: 'Marine Bio...', stackClass: 'stack-2' },
+        { type: 'purple', label: '12:00 PM', text: 'Coral Scien...', stackClass: 'stack-3' }
+      ],
+      '2026-04-08': [
+        { type: 'orange', label: '8:00 AM', text: 'Exploring...' },
+        { type: 'blue', label: '10:00 AM', text: 'Marine Bio...', stackClass: 'stack-2' },
+        { type: 'purple', label: '12:00 PM', text: 'Coral Scien...', stackClass: 'stack-3' }
+      ],
+      '2026-04-09': [
+        { type: 'orange', label: '8:00 AM', text: 'Exploring...' },
+        { type: 'blue', label: '10:00 AM', text: 'Marine Bio...', stackClass: 'stack-2' },
+        { type: 'purple', label: '12:00 PM', text: 'Coral Scien...', stackClass: 'stack-3' }
+      ],
+      '2026-04-10': [
+        { type: 'orange', label: '8:00 AM', text: 'Exploring...' },
+        { type: 'blue', label: '10:00 AM', text: 'Marine Bio...', stackClass: 'stack-2' },
+        { type: 'purple', label: '12:00 PM', text: 'Coral Scien...', stackClass: 'stack-3' }
+      ],
+      '2026-04-11': [
+        { type: 'gold', label: '1:00 PM', text: 'Office Hours' }
+      ]
+    };
+
+    function dateKey(date) {
+      const y = date.getFullYear();
+      const m = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
+      const d = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
+      return `${y}-${m}-${d}`;
+    }
+
+    function formatMonthYear(date) {
+      return `${monthNames[date.getMonth()]} ${date.getFullYear()}`;
+    }
+
+    function formatDayTitle(date) {
+      return `${monthNames[date.getMonth()]} ${date.getDate()}, ${date.getFullYear()}`;
+    }
+
+    function startOfDay(date) {
+      return new Date(date.getFullYear(), date.getMonth(), date.getDate());
+    }
+
+    function addDays(date, days) {
+      const next = new Date(date);
+      next.setDate(next.getDate() + days);
+      return next;
+    }
+
+    function renderMonthGrid(baseDate) {
+      if (!monthGridEl) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const year = baseDate.getFullYear();
+      const month = baseDate.getMonth();
+      const firstOfMonth = new Date(year, month, 1);
+      const firstCellDate = addDays(firstOfMonth, -firstOfMonth.getDay());
+
+      monthGridEl.innerHTML = '';
+
+      for (let i = 0; i < 42; i += 1) {
+        const cellDate = addDays(firstCellDate, i);
+        const dayCell = document.createElement('div');
+        dayCell.className = 'day';
+
+        if (cellDate.getMonth() !== month) {
+          dayCell.classList.add('spill');
+        }
+
+        const dateNumber = document.createElement('div');
+        dateNumber.className = 'date-number';
+        dateNumber.textContent = String(cellDate.getDate());
+        dayCell.appendChild(dateNumber);
+
+        if (cellDate.getMonth() === month) {
+          const events = monthEventMap[dateKey(cellDate)] || [];
+          events.forEach((eventData) => {
+            const eventEl = document.createElement('div');
+            const stackClass = eventData.stackClass ? ` ${eventData.stackClass}` : '';
+            eventEl.className = `event ${eventData.type}${stackClass}`;
+            eventEl.innerHTML = `<span class="label">${eventData.label}</span><span class="text">${eventData.text}</span>`;
+            dayCell.appendChild(eventEl);
+          });
+        }
+
+        monthGridEl.appendChild(dayCell);
+      }
+    }
+
+    function renderDayStrip(baseDate) {
+      if (!dayDatesEl || !dayWeekdaysEl) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      dayWeekdaysEl.innerHTML = '';
+      dayDatesEl.innerHTML = '';
+      const stripStart = addDays(baseDate, -3);
+
+      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i += 1) {
+        const dayDate = addDays(stripStart, i);
+        const weekdayNode = document.createElement('div');
+        weekdayNode.textContent = weekdayLetters[dayDate.getDay()];
+        dayWeekdaysEl.appendChild(weekdayNode);
+
+        const dayNode = document.createElement('div');
+        dayNode.textContent = String(dayDate.getDate());
+        dayNode.dataset.date = dateKey(dayDate);
+
+        if (i === 3) {
+          dayNode.className = 'selected';
+        }
+
+        dayDatesEl.appendChild(dayNode);
+      }
+    }
+
+    function renderDayActivity(baseDate) {
+      if (!timelineGridEl) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const events = monthEventMap[dateKey(baseDate)] || [];
+      const hourStart = 6;
+      const slotHeight = 54;
+
+      timelineGridEl.innerHTML = '';
+
+      if (events.length === 0) {
+        const noActivityEl = document.createElement('div');
+        noActivityEl.className = 'timeline-event orange';
+        noActivityEl.style.top = '6px';
+        noActivityEl.innerHTML = '<span class="label">No Activity:</span><span class="text">No scheduled activities for this day.</span>';
+        timelineGridEl.appendChild(noActivityEl);
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const slotUsage = {};
+
+      events.forEach((eventData, index) => {
+        const eventEl = document.createElement('div');
+        eventEl.className = `timeline-event ${eventData.type || 'blue'}`;
+        eventEl.innerHTML = `<span class="label">${eventData.label}</span><span class="text">${eventData.text}</span>`;
+
+        const match = eventData.label.match(/(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})\s*(AM|PM)/i);
+        let top;
+
+        if (match) {
+          let hour = Number(match[1]);
+          const minute = Number(match[2]);
+          const period = match[3].toUpperCase();
+
+          if (period === 'PM' && hour !== 12) {
+            hour += 12;
+          }
+          if (period === 'AM' && hour === 12) {
+            hour = 0;
+          }
+
+          const timeKey = `${hour}:${minute}`;
+          const overlap = slotUsage[timeKey] || 0;
+          slotUsage[timeKey] = overlap + 1;
+          top = ((hour - hourStart) * slotHeight) + ((minute / 60) * slotHeight) + 6 + (overlap * 14);
+        } else {
+          top = 6 + (index * 44);
+        }
+
+        eventEl.style.top = `${Math.max(6, top)}px`;
+        timelineGridEl.appendChild(eventEl);
+      });
+    }
+
+    function renderCalendar() {
+      monthTitleEl.textContent = formatMonthYear(selectedDate);
+      dayHeaderTitleEl.textContent = formatMonthYear(selectedDate);
+      dayTitleEl.textContent = formatDayTitle(selectedDate);
+      dayViewEl.setAttribute('aria-label', `${formatDayTitle(selectedDate)} day view`);
+      renderMonthGrid(selectedDate);
+      renderDayStrip(selectedDate);
+      renderDayActivity(selectedDate);
+    }
+
+    function setCalendarView(view) {
+      const isDay = view === 'day';
+      calendarShell.classList.toggle('is-day', isDay);
+
+      viewButtons.forEach((button) => {
+        const active = button.dataset.view === view;
+        button.classList.toggle('active', active);
+        button.classList.toggle('inactive', !active);
+      });
+    }
+
+    viewButtons.forEach((button) => {
+      button.addEventListener('click', () => {
+        setCalendarView(button.dataset.view);
+      });
+    });
+
+    monthPrevBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
+      selectedDate = new Date(selectedDate.getFullYear(), selectedDate.getMonth() - 1, selectedDate.getDate());
+      renderCalendar();
+    });
+
+    monthNextBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
+      selectedDate = new Date(selectedDate.getFullYear(), selectedDate.getMonth() + 1, selectedDate.getDate());
+      renderCalendar();
+    });
+
+    dayPrevBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
+      selectedDate = addDays(startOfDay(selectedDate), -1);
+      renderCalendar();
+    });
+
+    dayNextBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
+      selectedDate = addDays(startOfDay(selectedDate), 1);
+      renderCalendar();
+    });
+
+    dayDatesEl.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
+      const dayNode = event.target.closest('div[data-date]');
+      if (!dayNode) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const [y, m, d] = dayNode.dataset.date.split('-').map(Number);
+      selectedDate = new Date(y, m - 1, d);
+      renderCalendar();
+    });
+
+    renderCalendar();
+
+    attachCoryChat();
+  </script>
+</body>
+</html>

+    </div>

+      <input class="cory-input" type="text" placeholder="Type a message..." />
+      <button class="cory-send" type="button" aria-label="Send">
+        <img src="../assets/bb543680-485a-4fa9-b5ed-481596dd53fd.svg" alt="" />
+      </button>
+    </div>
+  </div>
+
+  <script>
+    function attachCoryChat() {
+      const coryToggle = document.querySelector('.floating-ai');
+      const coryPopup = document.getElementById('coryPopup');
+      if (!coryToggle || !coryPopup) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const coryBody = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-body');
+      const coryInput = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-input');
+      const corySend = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-send');
+      const coryClose = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-close');
+
+      function scrollCoryToLatest() {
+        if (coryBody) {
+          coryBody.scrollTop = coryBody.scrollHeight;
+        }
+      }
+
+      function appendCoryBubble(message, role = 'bot', isTyping = false) {
+        if (!coryBody) {
+          return null;
+        }
+
+        const bubble = document.createElement('div');
+        bubble.className = `cory-bubble${role === 'user' ? ' user' : ''}${isTyping ? ' typing' : ''}`;
+        const text = document.createElement('p');
+        text.textContent = message;
+        bubble.appendChild(text);
+        coryBody.appendChild(bubble);
+        scrollCoryToLatest();
+        return bubble;
+      }
+
+      function getCoryReply(userMessage) {
+        const message = userMessage.toLowerCase();
+        if (/(hi|hello|hey)/.test(message)) return 'Hey! I am Cory. Ask me about coral health, tank care, or where to find tools in this app.';
+        if (message.includes('ph')) return 'For most reef tanks, pH is healthiest around 8.1 to 8.4. Big swings are more stressful than small day-to-day changes.';
+        if (message.includes('temperature') || message.includes('temp')) return 'Coral systems usually do best around 76 to 80 degrees F. Keep temperature steady and avoid fast spikes.';
+        if (message.includes('salinity')) return 'Target salinity near 35 ppt. Stability matters the most, so adjust slowly if you need to correct it.';
+        if (message.includes('calendar')) return 'Use the Calendar to switch between Month and Day views, then click a date in Day view to jump directly to that day.';
+        if (message.includes('course') || message.includes('learn') || message.includes('assignment')) return 'In Teacher view, open Courses to manage lessons and due dates. Use Post Reading for reading prompts and follow-up tasks.';
+        return 'I can help with coral care or app navigation. Try asking about pH, salinity, temperature, Calendar, Messages, or Learn/Courses.';
+      }
+
+      function handleCorySend() {
+        if (!coryInput) return;
+        const userMessage = coryInput.value.trim();
+        if (!userMessage) return;
+        appendCoryBubble(userMessage, 'user');
+        coryInput.value = '';
+        const typingBubble = appendCoryBubble('Thinking...', 'bot', true);
+        window.setTimeout(() => {
+          if (typingBubble) typingBubble.remove();
+          appendCoryBubble(getCoryReply(userMessage), 'bot');
+        }, 350);
+      }
+
+      function setPopupOpen(open) {
+        coryPopup.setAttribute('aria-hidden', open ? 'false' : 'true');
+        if (open && coryInput) coryInput.focus();
+      }
+
+      coryToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
+        const isOpen = coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'false';
+        setPopupOpen(!isOpen);
+      });
+
+      coryClose.addEventListener('click', () => {
+        setPopupOpen(false);
+      });
+
+      document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
+        if (coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'true') return;
+        if (!coryPopup.contains(event.target) && !coryToggle.contains(event.target)) setPopupOpen(false);
+      });
+
+    document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+      if (event.key === 'Escape') {
+        setPopupOpen(false);
+      }
+    });
+
+      if (corySend && coryInput && coryBody) {
+        corySend.addEventListener('click', handleCorySend);
+        coryInput.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+          if (event.key === 'Enter') {
+            event.preventDefault();
+            handleCorySend();
+          }
+        });
+      }
+    }
+
+    attachCoryChat();
+  </script>
+</body>
+</html>

+  <script>
+    function attachCoryChat() {
+      const coryToggle = document.querySelector('.floating-ai, .cory-trigger');
+      const coryPopup = document.getElementById('coryPopup');
+      if (!coryToggle || !coryPopup) return;
+      const coryBody = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-body');
+      const coryInput = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-input');
+      const corySend = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-send');
+      const coryClose = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-close');
+      const isTeacherView = window.location.pathname.includes('/Teacher/');
+      const scrollCoryToLatest = () => { if (coryBody) coryBody.scrollTop = coryBody.scrollHeight; };
+      const appendCoryBubble = (message, role = 'bot', isTyping = false) => {
+        if (!coryBody) return null;
+        const bubble = document.createElement('div');
+        bubble.className = `cory-bubble${role === 'user' ? ' user' : ''}${isTyping ? ' typing' : ''}`;
+        const text = document.createElement('p');
+        text.textContent = message;
+        bubble.appendChild(text);
+        coryBody.appendChild(bubble);
+        scrollCoryToLatest();
+        return bubble;
+      };
+      const getCoryReply = (userMessage) => {
+        const message = userMessage.toLowerCase();
+        if (/(hi|hello|hey)/.test(message)) return 'Hey! I am Cory. Ask me about coral health, tank care, or where to find tools in this app.';
+        if (message.includes('ph')) return 'For most reef tanks, pH is healthiest around 8.1 to 8.4. Big swings are more stressful than small day-to-day changes.';
+        if (message.includes('temperature') || message.includes('temp')) return 'Coral systems usually do best around 76 to 80 degrees F. Keep temperature steady and avoid fast spikes.';
+        if (message.includes('salinity')) return 'Target salinity near 35 ppt. Stability matters the most, so adjust slowly if you need to correct it.';
+        if (message.includes('course') || message.includes('learn') || message.includes('assignment')) return isTeacherView ? 'In Teacher view, open Courses to manage lessons and due dates. Use Post Reading for reading prompts and follow-up tasks.' : 'In Student view, open Learn to check assignments and due dates, then track progress from your dashboard.';
+        if (message.includes('calendar')) return 'Use the Calendar to switch between Month and Day views, then click a date in Day view to jump directly to that day.';
+        return 'I can help with coral care or app navigation. Try asking about pH, salinity, temperature, Calendar, Messages, or Learn/Courses.';
+      };
+      const handleCorySend = () => {
+        if (!coryInput) return;
+        const userMessage = coryInput.value.trim();
+        if (!userMessage) return;
+        appendCoryBubble(userMessage, 'user');
+        coryInput.value = '';
+        const typingBubble = appendCoryBubble('Thinking...', 'bot', true);
+        window.setTimeout(() => {
+          if (typingBubble) typingBubble.remove();
+          appendCoryBubble(getCoryReply(userMessage), 'bot');
+        }, 350);
+      };
+      const setPopupOpen = (open) => {
+        coryPopup.setAttribute('aria-hidden', open ? 'false' : 'true');
+        if (open && coryInput) coryInput.focus();
+      };
+      coryToggle.addEventListener('click', () => { const isOpen = coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'false'; setPopupOpen(!isOpen); });
+      coryClose.addEventListener('click', () => {
+        setPopupOpen(false);
+      });
+      document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
+        if (coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'true') return;
+        if (!coryPopup.contains(event.target) && !coryToggle.contains(event.target)) setPopupOpen(false);
+      });
+      document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => { if (event.key === 'Escape') setPopupOpen(false); });
+      if (corySend && coryInput && coryBody) {
+        corySend.addEventListener('click', handleCorySend);
+        coryInput.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+          if (event.key === 'Enter') {
+            event.preventDefault();
+            handleCorySend();
+          }
+        });
+      }
+    }
+
+    attachCoryChat();
+  </script>
+</body>
+
+</html>

+  <div class="cory-popup" id="coryPopup" role="dialog" aria-label="Cory chat" aria-hidden="true">
+    <div class="cory-pointer" aria-hidden="true"></div>
+    <button class="cory-close" type="button" aria-label="Close Cory chat">×</button>
+    <div class="cory-header">
+      <div class="cory-avatar">
+        <img src="../assets/9e494c12-c6a7-45f9-91ac-f474512b6048.svg" alt="" />
+      </div>
+      <p class="cory-name">Cory</p>
+    </div>
+    <div class="cory-body">
+    </div>
+    <div class="cory-input-row">
+      <input class="cory-input" type="text" placeholder="Type a message..." />
+      <button class="cory-send" type="button" aria-label="Send">
+        <img src="../assets/bb543680-485a-4fa9-b5ed-481596dd53fd.svg" alt="" />
+      </button>
+    </div>
+  </div>
+
+  <script>
+    const coryToggle = document.querySelector('.floating-ai');
+    const coryPopup = document.getElementById('coryPopup');
+    const vitalHistoryTrigger = document.querySelector('.vitals-history');
+    const vitalHistoryModal = document.getElementById('vitalHistoryModal');
+    const vitalHistoryClose = document.querySelector('.vitals-history-close');
+    const coryBody = document.querySelector('.cory-body');
+    const coryInput = document.querySelector('.cory-input');
+    const corySend = document.querySelector('.cory-send');
+    const coryClose = document.querySelector('.cory-close');
+    const isTeacherView = window.location.pathname.includes('/Teacher/');
+
+    function scrollCoryToLatest() {
+      if (coryBody) {
+        coryBody.scrollTop = coryBody.scrollHeight;
+      }
+    }
+
+    function appendCoryBubble(message, role = 'bot', isTyping = false) {
+      if (!coryBody) {
+        return null;
+      }
+
+      const bubble = document.createElement('div');
+      bubble.className = `cory-bubble${role === 'user' ? ' user' : ''}${isTyping ? ' typing' : ''}`;
+
+      const text = document.createElement('p');
+      text.textContent = message;
+      bubble.appendChild(text);
+
+      coryBody.appendChild(bubble);
+      scrollCoryToLatest();
+      return bubble;
+    }
+
+    function getCoryReply(userMessage) {
+      const message = userMessage.toLowerCase();
+
+      if (/(hi|hello|hey)/.test(message)) {
+        return 'Hey! I am Cory. Ask me about coral health, tank care, or where to find tools in this app.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('ph')) {
+        return 'For most reef tanks, pH is healthiest around 8.1 to 8.4. Big swings are more stressful than small day-to-day changes.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('temperature') || message.includes('temp')) {
+        return 'Coral systems usually do best around 76 to 80 degrees F. Keep temperature steady and avoid fast spikes.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('salinity')) {
+        return 'Target salinity near 35 ppt. Stability matters the most, so adjust slowly if you need to correct it.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('redox') || message.includes('orp')) {
+        return 'Redox (ORP) helps show overall water chemistry stability. Use it as a trend indicator, not a single-pass/fail number.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('health') || message.includes('tank')) {
+        return 'A healthy tank usually means stable pH, temperature, salinity, and consistent maintenance. Small regular habits beat big corrections.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('clean') || message.includes('maintenance')) {
+        return 'Try a routine: check vitals daily, clean glass as needed, and schedule water changes on a fixed cadence.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('calendar')) {
+        return 'Use the Calendar to switch between Month and Day views, then click a date in Day view to jump directly to that day.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('message') || message.includes('chat')) {
+        return 'You can use Messages to communicate with your class team. I can also help summarize what to ask or post.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('course') || message.includes('learn') || message.includes('assignment')) {
+        return isTeacherView
+          ? 'In Teacher view, open Courses to manage lessons and due dates. Use Post Reading for reading prompts and follow-up tasks.'
+          : 'In Student view, open Learn to check assignments and due dates, then track progress from your dashboard.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('profile')) {
+        return 'Open Profile to review your account and class details. You can update info from the edit control there.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('help') || message.includes('what can you do')) {
+        return 'I can answer coral-care basics, explain tank metrics, and help you navigate pages like Calendar, Learn/Courses, Messages, and Profile.';
+      }
+
+      return 'I can help with coral care or app navigation. Try asking about pH, salinity, temperature, Calendar, Messages, or Learn/Courses.';
+    }
+
+    function handleCorySend() {
+      if (!coryInput) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const userMessage = coryInput.value.trim();
+      if (!userMessage) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      appendCoryBubble(userMessage, 'user');
+      coryInput.value = '';
+
+      const typingBubble = appendCoryBubble('Thinking...', 'bot', true);
+      window.setTimeout(() => {
+        if (typingBubble) {
+          typingBubble.remove();
+        }
+        appendCoryBubble(getCoryReply(userMessage), 'bot');
+      }, 350);
+    }
+
+    function setPopupOpen(open) {
+      coryPopup.setAttribute('aria-hidden', open ? 'false' : 'true');
+      if (open && coryInput) {
+        coryInput.focus();
+      }
+    }
+
+    function setVitalHistoryOpen(open) {
+      if (!vitalHistoryModal) {
+        return;
+      }
+      vitalHistoryModal.setAttribute('aria-hidden', open ? 'false' : 'true');
+      document.body.style.overflow = open ? 'hidden' : '';
+    }
+
+    coryToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
+      const isOpen = coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'false';
+      setPopupOpen(!isOpen);
+    });
+
+    coryClose.addEventListener('click', () => {
+      setPopupOpen(false);
+    });
+
+    if (vitalHistoryTrigger && vitalHistoryClose && vitalHistoryModal) {
+      vitalHistoryTrigger.addEventListener('click', () => {
+        setVitalHistoryOpen(true);
+      });
+
+      vitalHistoryClose.addEventListener('click', () => {
+        setVitalHistoryOpen(false);
+      });
+
+      vitalHistoryModal.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
+        if (event.target === vitalHistoryModal) {
+          setVitalHistoryOpen(false);
+        }
+      });
+    }
+
+    document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {      if (coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'true') {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      if (!coryPopup.contains(event.target) && !coryToggle.contains(event.target)) {
+        setPopupOpen(false);
+      }
+    });
+
+    document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+      if (event.key === 'Escape') {
+        setVitalHistoryOpen(false);
+        setPopupOpen(false);
+      }
+    });
+
+    if (corySend && coryInput && coryBody) {
+      corySend.addEventListener('click', handleCorySend);
+      coryInput.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+        if (event.key === 'Enter') {
+          event.preventDefault();
+          handleCorySend();
+        }
+      });
+      scrollCoryToLatest();
+    }
+
+    const healthEl = document.querySelector('.pct');
+    const deltaArrowEl = document.querySelector('.delta-arrow');
+    const deltaValueEl = document.querySelector('.delta-value');
+    const tempTrendArrowEl = document.querySelector('.temp-trend .trend-arrow');
+    const tempTrendValueEl = document.querySelector('.temp-trend .trend-value');
+    const salTrendArrowEl = document.querySelector('.sal-trend .trend-arrow');
+    const salTrendValueEl = document.querySelector('.sal-trend .trend-value');
+    const vitalValueEls = document.querySelectorAll('.vital .vital-value');
+    const vitalBackCopyEls = document.querySelectorAll('.vital .vital-back-copy');
+
+    if (healthEl && deltaArrowEl && deltaValueEl && tempTrendArrowEl && tempTrendValueEl && salTrendArrowEl && salTrendValueEl && vitalValueEls.length >= 4) {
+      const metrics = {
+        health: 94,
+        temp: 78.2,
+        ph: 8.4,
+        salinity: 35,
+        redox: 380
+      };
+
+      const bounds = {
+        health: [70, 100],
+        temp: [72, 84],
+        ph: [7.8, 8.8],
+        salinity: [30, 40],
+        redox: [300, 450]
+      };
+
+      function clamp(value, min, max) {
+        return Math.min(max, Math.max(min, value));
+      }
+
+      function jitterByPercent(value) {
+        const pct = (Math.random() * 4) - 2;
+        return {
+          value: value * (1 + (pct / 100)),
+          pct
+        };
+      }
+
+      function arrowFor(changePct) {
+        if (changePct > 0.05) {
+          return '↑';
+        }
+        if (changePct < -0.05) {
+          return '↓';
+        }
+        return '→';
+      }
+
+      function render(deltas) {
+        healthEl.textContent = `${Math.round(metrics.health)}%`;
+        deltaArrowEl.textContent = arrowFor(deltas.health);
+        deltaValueEl.textContent = `${Math.abs(deltas.health).toFixed(1)}%`;
+
+        tempTrendArrowEl.textContent = arrowFor(deltas.temp);
+        tempTrendValueEl.textContent = `${Math.abs(deltas.temp).toFixed(1)}°`;
+
+        salTrendArrowEl.textContent = arrowFor(deltas.salinity);
+        salTrendValueEl.textContent = `${Math.abs(deltas.salinity).toFixed(1)} ppt`;
+
+        vitalValueEls[0].textContent = `${metrics.temp.toFixed(1)}°F`;
+        vitalValueEls[1].textContent = metrics.ph.toFixed(2);
+        vitalValueEls[2].textContent = `${Math.round(metrics.salinity)} ppt`;
+        vitalValueEls[3].textContent = `${Math.round(metrics.redox)} mV`;
+
+        if (vitalBackCopyEls.length >= 4) {
+          vitalBackCopyEls[2].textContent = `Your salinity is currently ${Math.round(metrics.salinity)} ppt. Stability is key for a thriving reef, and you're nailing it!`;
+          vitalBackCopyEls[3].textContent = `Redox is looking great at ${Math.round(metrics.redox)} mV. High oxygen levels mean your corals are breathing easy!`;
+        }
+      }
+
+      function tick() {
+        const healthUpdate = jitterByPercent(metrics.health);
+        metrics.health = clamp(healthUpdate.value, bounds.health[0], bounds.health[1]);
+
+        const tempUpdate = jitterByPercent(metrics.temp);
+        metrics.temp = clamp(tempUpdate.value, bounds.temp[0], bounds.temp[1]);
+        metrics.ph = clamp(jitterByPercent(metrics.ph).value, bounds.ph[0], bounds.ph[1]);
+        const salinityUpdate = jitterByPercent(metrics.salinity);
+        metrics.salinity = clamp(salinityUpdate.value, bounds.salinity[0], bounds.salinity[1]);
+        metrics.redox = clamp(jitterByPercent(metrics.redox).value, bounds.redox[0], bounds.redox[1]);
+
+        render({
+          health: healthUpdate.pct,
+          temp: tempUpdate.pct,
+          salinity: salinityUpdate.pct
+        });
+        window.setTimeout(tick, 6000 + (Math.random() * 1000));
+      }
+
+      render({
+        health: 0,
+        temp: 0,
+        salinity: 0
+      });
+      window.setTimeout(tick, 6000 + (Math.random() * 1000));
+    }
+  </script>
+</body>
+</html>

+      </button>

+
+  <script>
+    function attachCoryChat() {
+      const coryToggle = document.querySelector('.floating-ai, .cory-trigger');
+      const coryPopup = document.getElementById('coryPopup');
+      if (!coryToggle || !coryPopup) return;
+      const coryBody = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-body');
+      const coryInput = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-input');
+      const corySend = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-send');
+      const coryClose = coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-close');
+      const isTeacherView = window.location.pathname.includes('/Teacher/');
+      const scrollCoryToLatest = () => { if (coryBody) coryBody.scrollTop = coryBody.scrollHeight; };
+      const appendCoryBubble = (message, role = 'bot', isTyping = false) => {
+        if (!coryBody) return null;
+        const bubble = document.createElement('div');
+        bubble.className = `cory-bubble${role === 'user' ? ' user' : ''}${isTyping ? ' typing' : ''}`;
+        const text = document.createElement('p');
+        text.textContent = message;
+        bubble.appendChild(text);
+        coryBody.appendChild(bubble);
+        scrollCoryToLatest();
+        return bubble;
+      };
+      const getCoryReply = (userMessage) => {
+        const message = userMessage.toLowerCase();
+        if (/(hi|hello|hey)/.test(message)) return 'Hey! I am Cory. Ask me about coral health, tank care, or where to find tools in this app.';
+        if (message.includes('ph')) return 'For most reef tanks, pH is healthiest around 8.1 to 8.4. Big swings are more stressful than small day-to-day changes.';
+        if (message.includes('temperature') || message.includes('temp')) return 'Coral systems usually do best around 76 to 80 degrees F. Keep temperature steady and avoid fast spikes.';
+        if (message.includes('salinity')) return 'Target salinity near 35 ppt. Stability matters the most, so adjust slowly if you need to correct it.';
+        if (message.includes('lesson') || message.includes('course') || message.includes('learn')) return isTeacherView ? 'In Teacher view, open Courses to manage lessons and due dates. Use Post Reading for reading prompts and follow-up tasks.' : 'In Student view, open Learn to check assignments and due dates, then track progress from your dashboard.';
+        if (message.includes('calendar')) return 'Use the Calendar to switch between Month and Day views, then click a date in Day view to jump directly to that day.';
+        return 'I can help with coral care or app navigation. Try asking about pH, salinity, temperature, Calendar, Messages, or Learn/Courses.';
+      };
+      const handleCorySend = () => {
+        if (!coryInput) return;
+        const userMessage = coryInput.value.trim();
+        if (!userMessage) return;
+        appendCoryBubble(userMessage, 'user');
+        coryInput.value = '';
+        const typingBubble = appendCoryBubble('Thinking...', 'bot', true);
+        window.setTimeout(() => {
+          if (typingBubble) typingBubble.remove();
+          appendCoryBubble(getCoryReply(userMessage), 'bot');
+        }, 350);
+      };
+      const setPopupOpen = (open) => {
+        coryPopup.setAttribute('aria-hidden', open ? 'false' : 'true');
+        if (open && coryInput) coryInput.focus();
+      };
+      coryToggle.addEventListener('click', () => { const isOpen = coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'false'; setPopupOpen(!isOpen); });
+
+      coryClose.addEventListener('click', () => {
+        setPopupOpen(false);
+      });
+
+      document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {        if (coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'true') return;
+        if (!coryPopup.contains(event.target) && !coryToggle.contains(event.target)) setPopupOpen(false);
+      });
+      document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => { if (event.key === 'Escape') setPopupOpen(false); });
+      if (corySend && coryInput && coryBody) {
+        corySend.addEventListener('click', handleCorySend);
+        coryInput.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+          if (event.key === 'Enter') {
+            event.preventDefault();
+            handleCorySend();
+          }
+        });
+      }
+    }
+
+    attachCoryChat();
+  </script>
+</body>
+</html>

+              d="M1000,300c-186.3,0 -342.889,127.503 -387.305,300l-312.695,0c-55.2,0 -100,44.8 -100,100c0,55.2 44.8,100 100,100l312.695,0c44.416,172.497 201.005,300 387.305,300c186.3,0 342.889,-127.503 387.305,-300l1512.69,0c55.2,0 100,-44.8 100,-100c0,-55.2 -44.8,-100 -100,-100l-1512.69,0c-44.416,-172.497 -201.005,-300 -387.305,-300Zm0,200c110.4,0 200,89.6 200,200c0,110.4 -89.6,200 -200,200c-110.4,0 -200,-89.6 -200,-200c0,-110.4 89.6,-200 200,-200Zm1200,700c-186.3,0 -342.889,127.503 -387.305,300l-1512.69,0c-55.2,0 -100,44.8 -100,100c0,55.2 44.8,100 100,100l1512.69,0c44.416,172.497 201.005,300 387.305,300c186.3,0 342.889,-127.503 387.305,-300l312.695,0c55.2,0 100,-44.8 100,-100c0,-55.2 -44.8,-100 -100,-100l-312.695,0c-44.416,-172.497 -201.005,-300 -387.305,-300Zm0,200c110.4,0 200,89.6 200,200c0,110.4 -89.6,200 -200,200c-110.4,0 -200,-89.6 -200,-200c0,-110.4 89.6,-200 200,-200Zm-1200,700c-186.3,0 -342.889,127.503 -387.305,300l-312.695,0c-55.2,0 -100,44.8 -100,100c0,55.2 44.8,100 100,100l312.695,0c44.416,172.497 201.005,300 387.305,300c186.3,0 342.889,-127.503 387.305,-300l1512.69,0c55.2,0 100,-44.8 100,-100c0,-55.2 -44.8,-100 -100,-100l-1512.69,0c-44.416,-172.497 -201.005,-300 -387.305,-300Zm0,200c110.4,0 200,89.6 200,200c0,110.4 -89.6,200 -200,200c-110.4,0 -200,-89.6 -200,-200c0,-110.4 89.6,-200 200,-200Z" />
+          </svg>

+

+                <img class="plane" src="../assets/bb543680-485a-4fa9-b5ed-481596dd53fd.svg" alt="" />
+                Send
+              </button>

+

+            <div class="sent-icon" aria-hidden="true"></div>

+
+  <button class="floating-ai" aria-label="Cory AI">
+    <img src="../assets/corychaticon.svg" alt="" />
+  </button>
+
+  <div class="cory-popup" id="coryPopup" role="dialog" aria-label="Cory chat" aria-hidden="true">
+    <div class="cory-pointer" aria-hidden="true"></div>
+    <button class="cory-close" type="button" aria-label="Close Cory chat">×</button>
+    <div class="cory-header">
+      <div class="cory-avatar">
+        <img src="../assets/9e494c12-c6a7-45f9-91ac-f474512b6048.svg" alt="" />
+      </div>
+      <p class="cory-name">Cory</p>
+    </div>
+    <div class="cory-body">
+    </div>
+    <div class="cory-input-row">
+      <input class="cory-input" type="text" placeholder="Type a message..." />
+      <button class="cory-send" type="button" aria-label="Send">
+        <img src="../assets/bb543680-485a-4fa9-b5ed-481596dd53fd.svg" alt="" />
+      </button>

+
+  <script>
+    const board = document.getElementById('board');
+    const messageList = document.getElementById('messageList');
+    const composePanel = document.getElementById('composePanel');
+    const composeClose = document.querySelector('.compose-close');
+    const composeForm = document.getElementById('composeForm');
+    const classSelect = document.getElementById('classSelect');
+    const studentSelect = document.getElementById('studentSelect');
+    const studentField = document.getElementById('studentField');
+    const messageInput = document.getElementById('messageInput');
+    const sendBtn = document.getElementById('sendBtn');
+    const newMessageTriggers = document.querySelectorAll('.new-message-trigger');
+    const coryToggle = document.querySelector('.floating-ai');
+    const coryPopup = document.getElementById('coryPopup');
+    const coryBody = coryPopup ? coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-body') : null;
+    const coryInput = coryPopup ? coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-input') : null;
+    const corySend = coryPopup ? coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-send') : null;
+    const coryClose = coryPopup ? coryPopup.querySelector('.cory-close') : null;
+    const isTeacherView = window.location.pathname.includes('/Teacher/');
+
+    const classStudents = {
+      'MAR BIO 101': [
+        'Jessica Flores',
+        'Michael Chen',
+        'Aisha Patel'
+      ],
+      'MAR BIO 201': [
+        'Ian Breen',
+        'Emilio Hernandez',
+        'Ariana Lopez'
+      ],
+      'MAR BIO 348': [
+        'Maya Torres',
+        'Noah Kim',
+        'Sofia Grant'
+      ]
+    };
+
+    let sentTimer = null;
+
+    function setComposerOpen(open) {
+      board.classList.toggle('is-compose', open);
+      composePanel.setAttribute('aria-hidden', open ? 'false' : 'true');
+      composePanel.classList.remove('is-sent');
+
+      if (open) {
+        messageInput.focus();
+      }
+    }
+
+    function setMode() {
+      // Logic removed as only student mode exists
+    }
+
+    function populateStudents(classCode) {
+      const students = classStudents[classCode] || [];
+      studentSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="" disabled selected>Select a student</option>' + students.map((student) => `<option value="${student}">${student}</option>`).join('');
+    }
+
+    function openCompose(classCode) {
+      setComposerOpen(true);
+      if (classCode) {
+        classSelect.value = classCode;
+        populateStudents(classCode);
+      }
+    }
+
+    function closeCompose() {
+      setComposerOpen(false);
+      composeForm.reset();
+      classSelect.value = '';
+      studentSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="" disabled selected>Select a student</option>';
+      updateSendState();
+      if (sentTimer) {
+        clearTimeout(sentTimer);
+        sentTimer = null;
+      }
+    }
+
+    function updateSendState() {
+      const classChosen = classSelect.value.trim().length > 0;
+      const studentChosen = studentSelect.value.trim().length > 0;
+      const hasMessage = messageInput.value.trim().length > 0;
+      sendBtn.disabled = !(classChosen && studentChosen && hasMessage);
+    }
+
+    newMessageTriggers.forEach((trigger) => {
+      trigger.addEventListener('click', () => {
+        openCompose(trigger.dataset.classCode);
+      });
+    });
+
+    composeClose.addEventListener('click', closeCompose);
+
+
+    classSelect.addEventListener('change', () => {
+      populateStudents(classSelect.value);
+      updateSendState();
+    });
+
+    studentSelect.addEventListener('change', updateSendState);
+    messageInput.addEventListener('input', updateSendState);
+
+    composeForm.addEventListener('submit', (event) => {
+      event.preventDefault();
+      if (sendBtn.disabled) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      composePanel.classList.add('is-sent');
+      sentTimer = setTimeout(() => {
+        closeCompose();
+      }, 2500);
+    });
+
+    document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+      if (event.key === 'Escape' && composePanel.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'false') {
+        closeCompose();
+      }
+    });
+
+    function scrollCoryToLatest() {
+      if (coryBody) {
+        coryBody.scrollTop = coryBody.scrollHeight;
+      }
+    }
+
+    function appendCoryBubble(message, role = 'bot', isTyping = false) {
+      if (!coryBody) {
+        return null;
+      }
+
+      const bubble = document.createElement('div');
+      bubble.className = `cory-bubble${role === 'user' ? ' user' : ''}${isTyping ? ' typing' : ''}`;
+
+      const text = document.createElement('p');
+      text.textContent = message;
+      bubble.appendChild(text);
+
+      coryBody.appendChild(bubble);
+      scrollCoryToLatest();
+      return bubble;
+    }
+
+    function getCoryReply(userMessage) {
+      const message = userMessage.toLowerCase();
+
+      if (/(hi|hello|hey)/.test(message)) {
+        return 'Hey! I am Cory. Ask me about coral health, tank care, or where to find tools in this app.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('ph')) {
+        return 'For most reef tanks, pH is healthiest around 8.1 to 8.4. Big swings are more stressful than small day-to-day changes.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('temperature') || message.includes('temp')) {
+        return 'Coral systems usually do best around 76 to 80 degrees F. Keep temperature steady and avoid fast spikes.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('salinity')) {
+        return 'Target salinity near 35 ppt. Stability matters the most, so adjust slowly if you need to correct it.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('message') || message.includes('chat')) {
+        return 'You can use Messages to communicate with your class team. I can also help summarize what to ask or post.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('calendar')) {
+        return 'Use the Calendar to switch between Month and Day views, then click a date in Day view to jump directly to that day.';
+      }
+
+      if (message.includes('course') || message.includes('learn') || message.includes('assignment')) {
+        return isTeacherView ? 'In Teacher view, open Courses to manage lessons and due dates. Use Post Reading for reading prompts and follow-up tasks.' : 'In Student view, open Learn to check assignments and due dates, then track progress from your dashboard.';
+      }
+
+      return 'I can help with coral care or app navigation. Try asking about pH, salinity, temperature, Calendar, Messages, or Learn/Courses.';
+    }
+
+    function handleCorySend() {
+      if (!coryInput) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const userMessage = coryInput.value.trim();
+      if (!userMessage) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      appendCoryBubble(userMessage, 'user');
+      coryInput.value = '';
+
+      const typingBubble = appendCoryBubble('Thinking...', 'bot', true);
+      window.setTimeout(() => {
+        if (typingBubble) {
+          typingBubble.remove();
+        }
+        appendCoryBubble(getCoryReply(userMessage), 'bot');
+      }, 350);
+    }
+
+    function setPopupOpen(open) {
+      if (!coryPopup) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      coryPopup.setAttribute('aria-hidden', open ? 'false' : 'true');
+      if (open && coryInput) {
+        coryInput.focus();
+      }
+    }
+
+    if (coryToggle && coryPopup) {
+      coryToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
+        const isOpen = coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'false';
+        setPopupOpen(!isOpen);
+      });
+
+      coryClose.addEventListener('click', () => {
+        setPopupOpen(false);
+      });
+
+      document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
+        if (coryPopup.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'true') {
+          return;
+        }
+
+        if (!coryPopup.contains(event.target) && !coryToggle.contains(event.target)) {
+          setPopupOpen(false);
+        }
+      });
+
+      document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+        if (event.key === 'Escape') {
+          setPopupOpen(false);
+        }
+      });
+    }
+
+    if (corySend && coryInput && coryBody) {
+      corySend.addEventListener('click', handleCorySend);
+      coryInput.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
+        if (event.key === 'Enter') {
+          event.preventDefault();
+          handleCorySend();
+        }
+      });
+    }
+  </script>
+</body>
+
+</html>
